items.transcript: 把你钱袋红彤菜
items.translation_en: Empty your pockets completely.
items.description: Uses the specific Hefei dialect phrase '红彤菜' to describe something being emptied or used up.

items.title: 合肥话版撒西不理来袭！禁欲系演绎，这味儿太上头了！
items.transcript: 把你腰杆舞分数
items.translation_en: Dance your waist to pieces.
items.description: Uses '舞分数' (wu fen shu), a typical Hefei regional expression for performing an action intensely.

items.title: 合肥话版撒西不理来袭！禁欲系演绎，这味儿太上头了！
items.transcript: 压趋色离心门抠
items.translation_en: Stuck in the heart.
items.description: Strong local phonetic characteristics and the dialectal term '心门抠' for the chest/heart area.

items.title: 欢迎收看疯狂动物城2，天津话，东北话，四川话，唐山方言，河南话，还是网友会整活。
items.transcript: 一撒，二撒，青天清早，騷老皮在等哪哈兒勒。
items.translation_en: One, two, early in the morning, the old fox is waiting right here.
items.description: Features Sichuanese vocabulary like '哪哈兒' and distinct tonal patterns.

items.title: 欢迎收看疯狂动物城2，天津话，东北话，四川话，唐山方言，河南话，还是网友会整活。
items.transcript: 介位老兔子，帶流氓來了啊。
items.translation_en: This old rabbit brought a hooligan along.
items.description: Utilizes the iconic Tianjin accent with '介' (this) and specific sentence endings.

items.title: 欢迎收看疯狂动物城2，天津话，东北话，四川话，唐山方言，河南话，还是网友会整活。
items.transcript: 這回這事兒要給我整岔屁了，你倆就給我滾犢子。
items.translation_en: If this task gets messed up this time, you two get lost.
items.description: Includes classic Northeast (Dongbei) slang such as '整岔屁' and '滾犢子'.

items.title: 欢迎收看疯狂动物城2，天津话，东北话，四川话，唐山方言，河南话，还是网友会整活。
items.transcript: 哎，我這正搗弄那油花兒呢，一會兒還得去開會。
items.translation_en: Hey, I'm just fiddling with these oil flowers, I have a meeting to attend in a bit.
items.description: Uses the Tangshan dialect's unique intonation and the verb '搗弄'.

items.title: 欢迎收看疯狂动物城2，天津话，东北话，四川话，唐山方言，河南话，还是网友会整活。
items.transcript: 跟這兒海溜呢，小腳溜，小仙女貌似大爪子。
items.translation_en: Strolling around here, with small steps, the little fairy looks like she has big claws.
items.description: Exhibits Henan dialect features such as the phrase '跟這兒' and local pronunciation.

items.title: 客家公主梅州黑糯米客家火炙黄酒娘酒老酒5斤产后营养补气血月子酒泡阿胶 正宗火炙娘酒5斤 2.33L 1瓶
items.transcript: 香香甜甜真係好好飲。
items.translation_en: It's fragrant and sweet, truly delicious to drink.
items.description: The speaker uses Meizhou Hakka phonology, particularly the 'ho yim' pronunciation for 'good to drink'.

items.title: 客家公主梅州黑糯米客家火炙黄酒娘酒老酒5斤产后营养补气血月子酒泡阿胶 正宗火炙娘酒5斤 2.33L 1瓶
items.transcript: 天氣冷哩，煲番杯黃酒雞。
items.translation_en: The weather is cold, let's make some yellow wine chicken.
items.description: Includes Hakka vocabulary and pronunciation for 'cold' (lang), 'weather' (tin hi), and the verb 'to brew/cook' (po).

items.title: 客家公主梅州黑糯米客家火炙黄酒娘酒老酒5斤产后营养补气血月子酒泡阿胶 正宗火炙娘酒5斤 2.33L 1瓶
items.transcript: 天氣冷哩，煲黃酒雞，暖暖身，香香甜甜。
items.translation_en: The weather is cold, make yellow wine chicken to warm the body, sweet and fragrant.
items.description: Features the repetitive structure and distinctive Hakka tones characteristic of the Meizhou region.

items.title: 哈尔滨方言有多简单
items.transcript: 南岗不叫南岗，叫南岗
items.translation_en: Nangang is not called Nángǎng, it's called Nángàng.
items.description: Demonstrates the specific tonal shift for the Nangang district in Harbin dialect.

items.title: 哈尔滨方言有多简单
items.transcript: 哈站不叫哈站，叫哈站
items.translation_en: Hazhan is not called Hāzhàn, it's called Házhàn.
items.description: Shows the local dialectal pronunciation of the abbreviation for Harbin Railway Station.

items.title: 哈尔滨方言有多简单
items.transcript: 大列巴不叫大列巴，叫大列巴
items.translation_en: Dalieba is not called Dàlièbā, it's called Dàliěba.
items.description: Specific local pronunciation of the traditional Russian-style bread popular in Harbin.

items.title: 哈尔滨方言有多简单
items.transcript: 格瓦斯不叫格瓦斯，叫格瓦斯
items.translation_en: Gewasi is not called Géwǎsī, it's called Gěwàsi.
items.description: Local pronunciation of the fermented drink Kvass, reflecting Harbin's unique linguistic influence.

items.title: 哈尔滨方言有多简单
items.transcript: 你是嘴硬你是
items.translation_en: You are just being stubborn.
items.description: Uses the colloquial Northeastern phrase '嘴硬' (zuiying) with a characteristic sentence structure.

items.title: 四平2区2县1市方言测试，能听懂几个
items.transcript: 昨天回农村老家了，跟你们分享一下我吃的这些美食啊。烀苞米，烀茄子，烀土豆，鸡蛋焖子。
items.translation_en: I went back to my hometown in the countryside yesterday and want to share some of the delicious food I ate. Steamed corn, steamed eggplant, steamed potatoes, and steamed egg paste.
items.description: The speaker uses the word '烀' (hū), which is a common Northeastern Chinese cooking term for steaming/stewing, and lists traditional local dishes like '鸡蛋焖子'.

items.title: 四平2区2县1市方言测试，能听懂几个
items.transcript: 我干哈呀？你干哈呀？你干哈不干哈，你告我一声你干哈呀？
items.translation_en: What am I doing? What are YOU doing? Tell me whether you're doing something or not, what exactly are you doing?
items.description: The use of '干哈' (gàn há) instead of '干什么' is a hallmark of the Jilin and broader Northeastern Mandarin dialect.

items.title: 四平2区2县1市方言测试，能听懂几个
items.transcript: 这大棉袄，你看杭州老太婆衣服，拿给这小伙穿的是好磕砢。咱那洋子该说好搭咕。
items.translation_en: Look at this big cotton coat, like an old lady's clothes from Hangzhou. It looks so awkward on this young guy. Our style is easy to talk about.
items.description: Uses regional slang like '磕砢' (kē le) meaning unsightly/awkward and '搭咕' (dā gu) meaning to talk or interact.

items.title: 四平2区2县1市方言测试，能听懂几个
items.transcript: 那买五花，变色，变色，五花。鲜橙，哈密瓜，赤培元来啦！
items.translation_en: Buy the five-flower pattern, color-changing, color-changing, five-flower pattern. Orange, cantaloupe, Chi Peiyuan is here!
items.description: The rhythmic shouting style and specific vocabulary for snacks/popsicles are characteristic of local street vendors in the region.

items.title: 四平2区2县1市方言测试，能听懂几个
items.transcript: 姓吴的叫吴烦恼，姓郑的叫郑大钱，姓好的叫好漂亮。那我姓暴，暴富的暴，那你叫我点啥？
items.translation_en: Someone surnamed Wu is called 'No Worries', one surnamed Zheng is called 'Big Money', one surnamed Hao is called 'Very Pretty'. My surname is Bao, like 'get rich quick', so what should you call me?
items.description: While using standard Mandarin vocabulary, the cadence, tone, and specific humor regarding surnames are typical of Jilin conversational style.

items.title: 40课 藏语教学 学会用藏语表达时间 拉萨口语  西藏方言藏语教学
items.transcript: chu-tshö tang-po re
items.translation_en: It is one o'clock.
items.description: Uses the ordinal 'tang-po' (first) for the first hour, which is characteristic of Lhasa time expression.

items.title: 40课 藏语教学 学会用藏语表达时间 拉萨口语  西藏方言藏语教学
items.transcript: chu-tshö sum tang kar-ma nga re
items.translation_en: It is three hours and five minutes (3:05).
items.description: Demonstrates the use of 'tang' (and) to connect hours and minutes in the Lhasa dialect.

items.title: 40课 藏语教学 学会用藏语表达时间 拉萨口语  西藏方言藏语教学
items.transcript: chu-tshö sum-pa yü-ne kar-ma nga re
items.translation_en: It is five minutes past three.
items.description: Illustrates the use of 'yü-ne' (past/passed) to describe time elapsed after the hour.

items.title: 40课 藏语教学 学会用藏语表达时间 拉萨口语  西藏方言藏语教学
items.transcript: thü-tshö yü-sha
items.translation_en: Time has expired/Time is up.
items.description: A specific Lhasa dialect idiom used when time or a duration has finished.

items.title: 40课 藏语教学 学会用藏语表达时间 拉萨口语  西藏方言藏语教学
items.transcript: chu-tshö shi-tang kar-ma nyi-shu tse-nga re
items.translation_en: It is four twenty-five (4:25).
items.description: Uses the specific numerical construction 'nyi-shu tse-nga' for twenty-five in the Lhasa dialect context.

items.title: 客家话海陆片-新竹
items.transcript: 小張昨晡日釣到五條大魚，我無釣到半條。
items.translation_en: Xiao Zhang caught five big fish yesterday, I didn't catch even half of one.
items.description: Uses '昨晡日' (yesterday) and '無' (not/no), which are characteristic of Hakka grammar and vocabulary.

items.title: 客家话海陆片-新竹
items.transcript: 你平常時有食菸無？無，我無食菸。
items.translation_en: Do you usually smoke? No, I don't smoke.
items.description: Uses '食菸' (literally 'eat smoke' for smoking) and the question particle '無', which are typical dialectal forms.

items.title: 客家话海陆片-新竹
items.transcript: 會落水咧，你等毋好出去啦。
items.translation_en: It's going to rain, you guys shouldn't go out.
items.description: '落水' (rain) and '你等' (plural suffix for people) are standard Hakka dialectal expressions.

items.title: 客家话海陆片-新竹
items.transcript: 請行等拿一張地圖。
items.translation_en: Please go and get a map.
items.description: The pronunciation of '請' and the structure of the verb phrase are specific to the Hailu Hakka dialect found in Hsinchu.

items.title: 客家话海陆片-新竹
items.transcript: 我講佢毋聽，無人共講得下這隻細福仔。
items.translation_en: I told him but he won't listen, no one can talk sense into this little rascal.
items.description: Includes '毋聽' (won't listen) and '細福仔', a local dialectal term for a child or rascal.

items.title: 南充1市3区5县方言测试，能听懂几个
items.transcript: 你发现没得，如今我们南充顺庆区的电动三轮车，也是越来越多了。
items.translation_en: Have you noticed that there are more and more electric tricycles in our Shunqing District of Nanchong nowadays?
items.description: Uses the characteristic Sichuanese '没得' (méidē) instead of the standard '没有' (méiyǒu) and shows local tonal patterns.

items.title: 南充1市3区5县方言测试，能听懂几个
items.transcript: 哎呀吃饭啊，我还没得嘉陵再起走一哟，就起吃饭啊。不过貌似超过三百公里哦，超过三百公里我肯定要刹回道室府哦。
items.translation_en: Oh, eating? I haven't even walked around Jialing yet, and you're already going to eat. But if it's over 300km, I'll definitely have to hit the brakes and head back to the master.
items.description: Contains heavy Jialing district accent, using '起' (qǐ) for '去' (qù) and local modal particles like '哟'.

items.title: 南充1市3区5县方言测试，能听懂几个
items.transcript: 我好多年没见，还在等我吃饭。你在哪里，我在南充。还在等我吃饭，我没在南充耶。
items.translation_en: I haven't seen you in years, and you're still waiting for me to eat. Where are you? I'm in Nanchong. Still waiting for me to eat? I'm not in Nanchong.
items.description: The pronunciation of '南充' (sounding like Lanchong) and '吃饭' (sounding like qiefan) is highly indicative of the Gaoping dialect.

items.title: 南充1市3区5县方言测试，能听懂几个
items.transcript: 閬中是我的根，閬中是我的魂，嘉陵江畔水叮咚... 張飛牛肉，保寧醋...
items.translation_en: Langzhong is my root, Langzhong is my soul, the water clinks by the Jialing River... Zhangfei Beef, Baoning Vinegar...
items.description: The speaker uses the distinct rhythmic and phonetic style of the Langzhong dialect, mentioning local specialties.

items.title: 南充1市3区5县方言测试，能听懂几个
items.transcript: 哎呀你们都不晓得哟，我那个媳妇儿对我点儿都不好，还穿的腰你腰气的，那个粉打的哟，大口红搽的哟，搽又搽。
items.translation_en: Oh, you guys have no idea. My wife isn't good to me at all; she dresses all flashy and puts on so much powder and lipstick, applying it over and over.
items.description: Features the Yingshan dialect's expressive modal particles and unique descriptive phrases like '腰你腰气' for being flashy.

items.title: 苏州台《民生在线》闲话苏州：评弹故事系列
items.transcript: 頃咄攱健䄳䄳健䄳䄳董䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳
items.translation_en: The weather is beautiful and bright, a sensible...
items.description: Introductory Suzhou Pingtan (traditional storytelling) sung in the distinct Suzhou dialect.

items.title: 苏州台《民生在线》闲话苏州：评弹故事系列
items.transcript: 茣䄳健䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳
items.translation_en: Xu Xian opened the Baohe Hall medicine shop, Xu Xian opened the Baohe Hall...
items.description: Spoken Pingtan narration featuring the soft tones and 'Wu' characteristics of Suzhou dialect.

items.title: 苏州台《民生在线》闲话苏州：评弹故事系列
items.transcript: 茣䄳健䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳
items.translation_en: Xu Xian stayed in Suzhou, and the owner of Daxing Hall, Wang Yongchang...
items.description: Traditional storytelling using local pronunciation for specific character and place names.

items.title: 苏州台《民生在线》闲话苏州：评弹故事系列
items.transcript: 䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳
items.translation_en: At that house in East Mountain, that house in Jin Mountain, Xu Xian...
items.description: Use of the Suzhou dialect's unique phonology in narrative Pingtan.

items.title: 苏州台《民生在线》闲话苏州：评弹故事系列
items.transcript: 䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳䄳
items.translation_en: The White Snake was shocked, and turned into a giant white snake...
items.description: Dramatic narration in the Suzhou dialect, part of the Pingtan storytelling technique.

items.title: 海口为什么叫海口？雅伦用海南话告诉你！
items.transcript: 海好，雅伦个海好，各位东国对燕个听位电视。
items.translation_en: Hello, I'm Yalen. Greetings to all the viewers and friends.
items.description: The pronunciation of 'Haikou' as 'Hai-hao' and the overall sentence structure are characteristic of the Hainanese dialect.

items.title: 海口为什么叫海口？雅伦用海南话告诉你！
items.transcript: 海好对大希滴，不久到海好，鲁地，能武希名。
items.translation_en: Haikou is a large city. Before long, we arrive in Haikou. Do you know how it got its name?
items.description: Uses specific Hainanese vocabulary and phonology, such as the pronunciation of 'city' and the question particle.

items.title: 海口为什么叫海口？雅伦用海南话告诉你！
items.transcript: 伊，就在海好的高圣，行大个调为了保证，爱就个脚红。
items.translation_en: It is located at the mouth of the river, and for the sake of development, it became important.
items.description: The usage of 'Yi' for 'it' and the unique pronunciation of geographical terms are typical of local Hainanese.

items.title: 海口为什么叫海口？雅伦用海南话告诉你！
items.transcript: 因为路好的沙汗，比阁倍，到这年名倍沙钱。
items.translation_en: Because of the sandbanks at the port, it was once named 'Haikou Pu' in those years.
items.description: Contains localized terms for 'port' and 'sandbank' with distinct tonal patterns.

items.title: 海口为什么叫海口？雅伦用海南话告诉你！
items.transcript: 海好浦，一为九拜地个雅化呼含塞里。
items.translation_en: Haikou Pu, which is an elegant way of referring to the local area's history.
items.description: The speaker uses traditional Hainanese phrasing and pronunciation to describe historical nomenclature.

items.title: 【春节特供】当英特尔机器人学会重庆方言Rap，这年味儿简直太“辣”了！
items.transcript: 这是我们重庆生活
items.translation_en: This is our Chongqing life.
items.description: Uses the Chongqing dialect's distinct tonal patterns and explicitly references the city's lifestyle.

items.title: 【春节特供】当英特尔机器人学会重庆方言Rap，这年味儿简直太“辣”了！
items.transcript: 火锅香麻辣味真的还不错
items.translation_en: The fragrant, numb, and spicy flavor of hotpot is really not bad.
items.description: References 'hotpot' and 'spicy/numb' flavors, which are central to Chongqing culture, delivered with local pronunciation.

items.title: 【春节特供】当英特尔机器人学会重庆方言Rap，这年味儿简直太“辣”了！
items.transcript: 重庆Hip-Hop咱们爱喝这具体
items.translation_en: Chongqing Hip-Hop, we love this specifically.
items.description: Combines regional identity ('Chongqing') with local slang and dialect-inflected rap flow.

items.title: 【春节特供】当英特尔机器人学会重庆方言Rap，这年味儿简直太“辣”了！
items.transcript: 火锅得老味简直会算得
items.translation_en: The old flavor of the hotpot is truly something.
items.description: Features the characteristic 'er' sound and local grammatical structures common in Southwestern Mandarin.

items.title: 【春节特供】当英特尔机器人学会重庆方言Rap，这年味儿简直太“辣”了！
items.transcript: 重庆Hip-Hop 回流流量澎湃
items.translation_en: Chongqing Hip-Hop, the returning traffic is surging.
items.description: Uses the specific cadence and regional accent associated with Chongqing rappers.

items.title: 客家新闻:台中客委会辨研习班 传承诏安客语
items.transcript: 今兜來到中部端，為著教純詔安客話，台中市客委會今年特別辦理詔安客話研習班。
items.translation_en: Coming to Central Taiwan, to teach pure Zhao'an Hakka, the Taichung City Hakka Affairs Commission has specially organized a Zhao'an Hakka workshop this year.
items.description: Uses Zhao'an Hakka, a specific dialectal branch characterized by unique phonology and vocabulary distinct from mainstream Sixian or Hailu Hakka.

items.title: 客家新闻:台中客委会辨研习班 传承诏安客语
items.transcript: 對哩身外，一兩三四五六，愛問好，昂做喇，甘做十飽嗎，提命，提命，台語講台中啦，松茂卡姆。
items.translation_en: Counting from one to six, saying hello, how are you, doing well... 'Ti-miang', in Taiwanese it means 'naming' (Taichung), the Matsushige area.
items.description: The speaker specifically recites numbers and local terms in the Zhao'an Hakka dialect to demonstrate its unique pronunciation and vocabulary.

items.title: 客家新闻:台中客委会辨研习班 传承诏安客语
items.transcript: 目前詔安客話的米色唔係一般，傳承文化十七年，台中市客委會講，等下六禮拜的課程結束後，再過來做中提同客場。
items.translation_en: Currently, the state of Zhao'an Hakka is not ordinary; with 17 years of cultural heritage, the Taichung Hakka Commission says after the six-week course ends, they will follow up with further community discussions.
items.description: Narration continues in the Zhao'an Hakka dialect, which is a minority dialect in the Taichung and Yunlin areas of Taiwan.

items.title: 🇲🇾UP说的🇨🇳宜昌人：我不信！！
items.transcript: 我觉得我好像找到了宜昌人的口头禅，就是：我不信！
items.translation_en: I think I've found a catchphrase of Yichang people, which is: 'I don't believe it!'
items.description: Explicitly identifies a specific phrase as a regional catchphrase associated with Yichang residents.

items.title: 🇲🇾UP说的🇨🇳宜昌人：我不信！！
items.transcript: 我发现群里的云朋友跟小凡都很爱说：我不信！
items.translation_en: I found that both my online friends in the group and Xiaofan love saying: 'I don't believe it!'
items.description: Notes the high frequency of this specific phrase among people from the target location.

items.title: 🇲🇾UP说的🇨🇳宜昌人：我不信！！
items.transcript: 然后他就会说：我不信！
items.translation_en: Then he would say: 'I don't believe it!'
items.description: Demonstrates the conversational application of this Yichang-specific linguistic habit.

items.title: 🇲🇾UP说的🇨🇳宜昌人：我不信！！
items.transcript: 我有带外套。我不信！
items.translation_en: I brought a jacket. 'I don't believe it!'
items.description: Provides another example of how the catchphrase is used as an instinctive response in local speech patterns.

items.title: 🇲🇾UP说的🇨🇳宜昌人：我不信！！
items.transcript: 可是他又不是在反驳你，也没有很不礼貌地回应你。就是一种本能的反应。
items.translation_en: But he's not contradicting you, nor is he responding rudely. It's just an instinctive reaction.
items.description: Explains the unique pragmatic function of this phrase in the Yichang regional context.

items.title: 当山东话遇到说唱之济南大学生的爱情故事------《爱走不完经十路》
items.transcript: 推情话，他努力改朝
items.translation_en: He speaks so much sweet talk, he's trying to change his ways.
items.description: The word '推' (tuī) is used here as an intensifier meaning 'very' or 'extremely,' which is a distinct feature of the Jinan dialect.

items.title: 当山东话遇到说唱之济南大学生的爱情故事------《爱走不完经十路》
items.transcript: 他推味儿，他披外套
items.translation_en: He looks so cool/stylish in his coat.
items.description: The phrase '推味儿' (tuī wèir) is a local Jinan slang expression used to describe someone as being very stylish, cool, or having a distinct attitude.

items.title: 当山东话遇到说唱之济南大学生的爱情故事------《爱走不完经十路》
items.transcript: 爱就像走不完的经十路
items.translation_en: Love is like the endless Jingshi Road.
items.description: Refers to Jingshi Road, the iconic main artery of Jinan, used here as a local cultural metaphor for an long journey.

items.title: 当山东话遇到说唱之济南大学生的爱情故事------《爱走不完经十路》
items.transcript: 他说他也一定不当那个负心人
items.translation_en: He says he definitely won't be an unfaithful man.
items.description: The sentence exhibits the characteristic 'Jinan Mandarin' (Ji'nan Pu) accent, particularly in the flat tones and the specific rhythm of the delivery.

items.title: 太原车牌歌
items.transcript: 绝望呼叫太原人
items.translation_en: Desperately calling the people of Taiyuan
items.description: Sets the regional context by addressing the Taiyuan local community directly.

items.title: 太原车牌歌
items.transcript: 晋A省会领，晋B云中的
items.translation_en: Jin A leads the provincial capital, Jin B belongs to Yunzhong (Datong)
items.description: The rhythmic delivery and the specific pronunciation of 'Jin' (the Shanxi province abbreviation) reflect the local Jin Chinese accent.

items.title: 太原车牌歌
items.transcript: 太原调井美
items.translation_en: The Taiyuan tune is very beautiful
items.description: Features the word '井' (jǐng) as a dialectal intensifier meaning 'very' or 'especially,' which is characteristic of the Taiyuan/Jin dialect.

items.title: 方言版喊麦（徐州~）
items.transcript: 万影泪九点五灯那几人醉我几人风
items.translation_en: Ten thousand shadows of tears, nine-point-five lamps, some are drunk while I am like the wind.
items.description: The pronunciation of 'jiren' and 'feng' reflects the distinct tonal patterns and vowel shifts characteristic of the Xuzhou dialect.

items.title: 方言版喊麦（徐州~）
items.transcript: 我赶到呢比扎勒啊几人疼我那几人宠
items.translation_en: I feel it more than a prick, how many people ache for me, how many people pamper me.
items.description: The phrase '赶到呢' (gandao ne) and the use of '扎勒' (zhale) are idiomatic and phonetically typical of the northern Jiangsu/Xuzhou region.

items.title: 方言版喊麦（徐州~）
items.transcript: 你走后我心魂飞几世年呢几世鬼
items.translation_en: After you left, my soul flew away; how many years and how many ghosts have passed?
items.description: The rhythmic cadence and the specific pronunciation of 'shi' (generations) align with Xuzhou dialect features.

items.title: 方言版喊麦（徐州~）
items.transcript: 我有些血性上辈熬过年我怕过黑
items.translation_en: I have some courage from my ancestors; I've endured the years and I've feared the dark.
items.description: The articulation of 'xuexing' and 'shangbei' utilizes local phonemes found in Xuzhou speech.

items.title: 【赤峰方言】家乡话（字幕已崩）
items.transcript: 也了个，我本个儿上疼。
items.translation_en: Yesterday, my tooth was hurting.
items.description: Includes regional terms like '也了个' (yesterday) and '本个儿' (tooth) typical of the Chifeng/Northeastern dialect.

items.title: 【赤峰方言】家乡话（字幕已崩）
items.transcript: 就我朋友一块儿近憋到头条街那个阿的，小仙儿炸咕炸咕。
items.translation_en: I went with my friend to that place on Toutiao Street, to a small clinic to get it treated.
items.description: '阿的' (there/that place) and '炸咕炸咕' (to treat or repair) are specific dialectal expressions.

items.title: 【赤峰方言】家乡话（字幕已崩）
items.transcript: 眼看没到晌火头，时间赶儿太悬。
items.translation_en: Seeing that it wasn't yet noon/mealtime, the timing was very tight.
items.description: '晌火头' refers to mealtime (usually noon) and '太悬' is used to describe a tight or risky situation.

items.title: 【赤峰方言】家乡话（字幕已崩）
items.transcript: 行了这呼，顺稍划拉个炊事儿，买点儿棒子面儿拉合呢。
items.translation_en: So in that case, I'd just grab a quick bite along the way, maybe get some cornmeal ones.
items.description: '划拉' (to grab/eat quickly) and '棒子面' (cornmeal) are colloquial terms common in Northern dialects.

items.title: 【赤峰方言】家乡话（字幕已崩）
items.transcript: 没曾想遇着个气灯儿，人它妈搁应人。
items.translation_en: Never thought I'd run into a real nuisance, the guy was so damn annoying.
items.description: '气灯儿' (an annoying person/nuisance) and '搁应' (annoying/disgusting) are strong dialectal markers in the Chifeng area.

items.title: 收听青海“生活频道”西宁方言广播小说《花儿是心上的油》片段
items.transcript: 前几天，本村子人们走分子凑回来
items.translation_en: A few days ago, the villagers came back from contributing to the gift fund
items.description: Features the distinct Xining pronunciation of 'cūn zi' (village) and the regional social term 'zǒu fèn zi' (gift money).

items.title: 收听青海“生活频道”西宁方言广播小说《花儿是心上的油》片段
items.transcript: 小娃，那你说话仙撒，把你连着个柜底，把你阿妈也磨着柜底。
items.translation_en: Xiaowa, tell me about Xian San; it involves you and is wearing your mother out too.
items.description: Uses '小娃' (child) and the regional metaphorical idiom '磨着柜底' referring to long-term suffering or being stuck.

items.title: 收听青海“生活频道”西宁方言广播小说《花儿是心上的油》片段
items.transcript: 哎呀，阿大，那你说哈留，不要我耳聩嘛！
items.translation_en: Oh Dad, speak up, don't leave me in the dark!
items.description: The term '阿大' (Ada) is the traditional Xining address for father, and '耳聩' is used in a regional context for being unheard or confused.

items.title: 收听青海“生活频道”西宁方言广播小说《花儿是心上的油》片段
items.transcript: 小娃，小娃你不哭，那你一萨话留和阿大阿妈说呗，说门背火，阿大这就不仅治呗。
items.translation_en: Xiaowa, don't cry; tell Dad and Mom whatever is on your mind. If you're unhappy, Dad won't force you.
items.description: '一萨话' (whatever/any word) and '不仅治' (won't force/don't bother) are highly characteristic of the local dialect.

items.title: 收听青海“生活频道”西宁方言广播小说《花儿是心上的油》片段
items.transcript: 哎呀，娃娃不服，那就不服吧，凡事说流，小娃地那个发场上吓着子溜系溜。
items.translation_en: Oh, if the child doesn't agree, then so be it; once it's said, the child was scared and sobbing on the floor.
items.description: Uses local particles and descriptive regional adverbs like '子溜系溜' to describe the child's state.

items.title: 闽南话正在逐步普化②，新式派&古早派~的差别#闽南语实验室 #解锁闽南方言 #闽南的青年 #闽南乡音传播计划 厦漳泉台·十里不同音#闽南语的不同
items.transcript: 房东闽南话怎么讲？房东？厝主啦！
items.translation_en: How do you say landlord in Minnan? Pang-tong? It's Chu-chu!
items.description: It contrasts 'Pang-tong' (a Mandarin-influenced pronunciation) with the traditional term 'Chu-chu' (House-owner).

items.title: 闽南话正在逐步普化②，新式派&古早派~的差别#闽南语实验室 #解锁闽南方言 #闽南的青年 #闽南乡音传播计划 厦漳泉台·十里不同音#闽南语的不同
items.transcript: 故意怎么说呢？故意？挑刚啦！
items.translation_en: How do you say 'on purpose'? Ko-i? It's Thiau-kang!
items.description: It highlights the difference between the modernized 'Ko-i' and the authentic Minnan word 'Thiau-kang'.

items.title: 闽南话正在逐步普化②，新式派&古早派~的差别#闽南语实验室 #解锁闽南方言 #闽南的青年 #闽南乡音传播计划 厦漳泉台·十里不同音#闽南语的不同
items.transcript: 脾气怎么讲？脾气？性地啦！
items.translation_en: How do you say 'temper'? Phi-khì? It's Sèng-tē!
items.description: It shows 'Sèng-tē' as the traditional expression for temperament compared to the Mandarin-derived 'Phi-khì'.

items.title: 闽南话正在逐步普化②，新式派&古早派~的差别#闽南语实验室 #解锁闽南方言 #闽南的青年 #闽南乡音传播计划 厦漳泉台·十里不同音#闽南语的不同
items.transcript: 运气怎么讲啊？运气？利运啦！
items.translation_en: How do you say 'luck'? Un-khì? It's Lī-ūn!
items.description: It compares the common 'Un-khì' with the more classical Minnan 'Lī-ūn'.

items.title: 闽南话正在逐步普化②，新式派&古早派~的差别#闽南语实验室 #解锁闽南方言 #闽南的青年 #闽南乡音传播计划 厦漳泉台·十里不同音#闽南语的不同
items.transcript: 拍马屁这个怎么讲呢？拍马屁？扶蓝脬！
items.translation_en: How do you say 'to brown-nose'? Phah-ma-pi? Pho-lam-pha!
items.description: It provides the colorful local idiom 'Pho-lam-pha' as the authentic alternative to the literal translation of the Mandarin phrase.

items.title: 西安地下女rapper 方言说唱
items.transcript: 这就是西北的口音，西北的土壤，生长出西北人的rap主场
items.translation_en: This is the Northwest accent, the Northwest soil, growing the Northwest people's rap home court
items.description: Directly references the 'Northwest accent' with the flattened tones and specific rhythmic flow characteristic of the Guanzhong region.

items.title: 西安地下女rapper 方言说唱
items.transcript: 吃的是面臊子的回韵淡，看那支伴奏都很情感
items.translation_en: Eating the lingering flavor of Saozi noodles, looking at that accompaniment with so much emotion
items.description: Mentions 'Saozi' noodles (a Shaanxi staple) and uses local pronunciation for 'mian' (noodles) and 'saozi'.

items.title: 西安地下女rapper 方言说唱
items.transcript: 冲切到西安...西安到额这的加点菜，西北到额这的加点菜
items.translation_en: Charging into Xi'an... Xi'an is where I add more to the plate, the Northwest is where I add more to the plate
items.description: Uses the word '额' (é) instead of '我' (wǒ) for 'I' or 'me', which is a quintessential marker of the Xi'an dialect.

items.title: 兰州和银川的脱口秀观众们，有馕吃了
items.transcript: 一大早拉着我去那个馕坑边上，等着出炉那几个大馕。
items.translation_en: Early in the morning, she dragged me to the side of the nang pit, waiting for those large flatbreads to come out of the oven.
items.description: Uses specific regional terminology like '馕坑' (nang pit) and a Northwestern cadence in the narrative delivery.

items.title: 兰州和银川的脱口秀观众们，有馕吃了
items.transcript: 大爷说啥叫主打秀？我这儿主打馕。
items.translation_en: The old man said, 'What's a main show? My specialty here is nang.'
items.description: Features the dialectal '啥' (shá) for 'what' and the blunt, humorous conversational style typical of Northern/Northwestern speakers.

items.title: 兰州和银川的脱口秀观众们，有馕吃了
items.transcript: 我说我还咋热情呢？坐他腿上讲脱口秀吗？
items.translation_en: I said, 'How much more hospitable can I be? Should I sit on their laps to do the talk show?'
items.description: Includes '咋' (zǎ), a common dialectal replacement for '怎么' (how) in Northern and Northwestern China.

items.title: 兰州和银川的脱口秀观众们，有馕吃了
items.transcript: 他让我边扭脖子边讲脱口秀。
items.translation_en: She wanted me to do the neck-twisting dance while performing the talk show.
items.description: Refers to '扭脖子', a distinctive move in Xinjiang folk dance, often referenced in regional humor.

items.title: 美人鱼的夏天但是内蒙方言版——黄河鱼的夏天
items.transcript: 哎呀，这咋上房了，哎呀。
items.translation_en: Oh, why did it go up on the roof, oh.
items.description: Uses the dialectal word '咋' (za) for 'how/why' and regional exclamation patterns common in Ordos.

items.title: 美人鱼的夏天但是内蒙方言版——黄河鱼的夏天
items.transcript: 帮我捶下子毛脱子咋。
items.translation_en: Help me pat down the fluff.
items.description: The term '毛脱子' (máo tuō zi) is a specific regional word for hair or fluff.

items.title: 美人鱼的夏天但是内蒙方言版——黄河鱼的夏天
items.transcript: 样子把我死太咽了，妈呀，得个动弹了。
items.translation_en: It scared me to death, oh my, it's moving.
items.description: Includes the local expression '死太咽' (sǐ tài yàn) for extreme fear and '动弹' (dòng tan) for movement.

items.title: 美人鱼的夏天但是内蒙方言版——黄河鱼的夏天
items.transcript: 哎呀，这凉飕水把子贼，热一大打的。
items.translation_en: Oh, this cold water is piercing, a big splash.
items.description: Uses '水把子' and the intensifier '贼' (zéi) in a manner characteristic of Inner Mongolian speech.

items.title: 美人鱼的夏天但是内蒙方言版——黄河鱼的夏天
items.transcript: 仙了，仙了，你是不是也变黄河鱼了。
items.translation_en: It's over, it's over, have you also become a Yellow River fish?
items.description: The use of '仙了' (xiān le) to mean 'finished' or 'done for' is a specific regional colloquialism.

items.title: 2月2日，两类视频同日粉丝同样多，留此存照。#荔浦话词典 #粉丝 #方言 #地方文化
items.transcript: 今天好，2024年2月2号，10点半，两类视频粉丝同样多。
items.translation_en: Hello today, it is February 2nd, 2024, at 10:30 AM, and two categories of videos have the same number of fans.
items.description: The speech features the distinct tonal patterns and vowel pronunciations of the Lipu dialect, specifically within the Southwest Mandarin group.

items.title: 【已作废】北京—东北官话各方言语音对比【北京】【黑龙江】【吉林】【辽宁】【内蒙古】【承德】【赤峰】【哈尔滨】【长春】【锦州】【沈阳】【鞍山】【鸡西】【佳木斯】
items.transcript: 小张昨个儿掉了一条大鱼，我没有钓着。
items.translation_en: Xiao Zhang caught a big fish yesterday; I didn't catch one.
items.description: The use of 'zuór ge' (昨个儿) for 'yesterday' is a characteristic colloquialism of the Northeastern Mandarin region.

items.title: 【已作废】北京—东北官话各方言语音对比【北京】【黑龙江】【吉林】【辽宁】【内蒙古】【承德】【赤峰】【哈尔滨】【长春】【锦州】【沈阳】【鞍山】【鸡西】【佳木斯】
items.transcript: 你平时抽烟吗？不的，我不抽烟。
items.translation_en: Do you usually smoke? No, I don't smoke.
items.description: The use of 'bù de' (不的) as a standalone negative response is a common feature in Northeastern dialects.

items.title: 【已作废】北京—东北官话各方言语音对比【北京】【黑龙江】【吉林】【辽宁】【内蒙古】【承德】【赤峰】【哈尔滨】【长春】【锦州】【沈阳】【鞍山】【鸡西】【佳木斯】
items.transcript: 这毛巾很埋汰了，扔了吧。
items.translation_en: This towel is very dirty; throw it away.
items.description: The word 'mǎitai' (埋汰) is a classic dialectal term for 'dirty' used almost exclusively in Northeast China.

items.title: 【已作废】北京—东北官话各方言语音对比【北京】【黑龙江】【吉林】【辽宁】【内蒙古】【承德】【赤峰】【哈尔滨】【长春】【锦州】【沈阳】【鞍山】【鸡西】【佳木斯】
items.transcript: 我吃过兔子肉，你吃过没？没，我没吃过。
items.translation_en: I've eaten rabbit meat, have you? No, I haven't.
items.description: The rising intonation at the end of the question and the specific cadence of the denial are typical of the Jiamusi/Heilongjiang regional accent.

items.title: 【已作废】北京—东北官话各方言语音对比【北京】【黑龙江】【吉林】【辽宁】【内蒙古】【承德】【赤峰】【哈尔滨】【长春】【锦州】【沈阳】【鞍山】【鸡西】【佳木斯】
items.transcript: 你皮我高，他皮你还高。
items.translation_en: You are taller than me, and he is even taller than you.
items.description: The phonetic shift of 'bǐ' (比) to an aspirated or differently voiced 'pí' sound is a notable local variation in the Jiamusi speaker's delivery.

items.title: 每天和朋友学一句方言：衡水话
items.transcript: 你干嘛儿咧
items.translation_en: What are you doing?
items.description: Uses the dialect-specific final particle and a characteristic rising intonation at the end of the sentence.

items.title: 每天和朋友学一句方言：衡水话
items.transcript: 你干嘛儿咧
items.translation_en: What are you doing?
items.description: The speakers specifically discuss the 'upward hook' or rising pitch required for this Hengshui dialect expression.

items.title: 每天和朋友学一句方言：衡水话
items.transcript: 你干嘛儿咧
items.translation_en: What are you doing?
items.description: A successful attempt at mimicking the dialect's unique tonal contour compared to Standard Mandarin.

items.title: 每天和朋友学一句方言：衡水话
items.transcript: 你干嘛儿咧
items.translation_en: What are you doing?
items.description: Final demonstration of the local phrase used to greet or ask about someone's current activity in Hengshui.

items.title: 拒绝内耗，有事直接哎呦
items.transcript: 哎呦，是不是你脑子瓦特了呐？
items.translation_en: Oh, has your brain short-circuited?
items.description: Features the dialectal term '瓦特' (meaning broken or malfunctioning) and the final particle '呐' delivered with a distinct Nanjing regional intonation.

items.title: 拒绝内耗，有事直接哎呦
items.transcript: 哎呦，你个傻X
items.translation_en: Oh, you idiot.
items.description: The specific sharp, downward intonation of 'Aiyou' is characteristic of the assertive and direct style of the Nanjing dialect.

items.title: 拒绝内耗，有事直接哎呦
items.transcript: 正好我也想家了，遇到没有素质的，我脾气也不是很好，不会惯着你。
items.translation_en: Coincidentally I miss home; when I meet people with no manners, my temper isn't great, and I won't put up with you.
items.description: The speaker employs a strong Nanjing/Jianghuai accent and assertive tone typical of local residents expressing their 'no-nonsense' attitude.

items.title: 南  通  超  人
items.transcript: 南通才得白乐格，吾是最极归你。
items.translation_en: Nantong's Genos, I am the coolest one.
items.description: Uses the dialectal pronunciation of 'Genos' as '白乐格' and '吾' for the first person pronoun, characteristic of Nantong speech.

items.title: 南  通  超  人
items.transcript: 啥么发得混，一阳恶乐是去丹修古。
items.translation_en: What is going on? Your face looks terrible.
items.description: Features the unique Nantong question '啥么' and local descriptive adjectives like '丹修古'.

items.title: 南  通  超  人
items.transcript: 喂，是南通才得，你个死标致白乐格过。
items.translation_en: Hey, it's a Nantong person, you're a very handsome Genos.
items.description: Uses '标致' (handsome/pretty) with an intensive prefix '死' and the local particle '过'.

items.title: 南  通  超  人
items.transcript: 你把悉莫跑极了撒？吾也是咋不啦你个刺呐快极所其。
items.translation_en: Where are you running? I am also going to that place.
items.description: Includes '悉莫' which means 'what' or 'where' in the dialect, and the interrogative particle '撒'.

items.title: 南  通  超  人
items.transcript: 昂说你个没里子。哎呀，吓死我个舌头啊。
items.translation_en: I told you you're useless. Oh my, it scared me to death.
items.description: '没里子' is a local idiom for being useless or having no face, and '吓死我个舌头' (scared my tongue to death) is a highly specific Nantong exaggeration for being frightened.

items.title: 广州人小时候“深信不疑”的谣言
items.transcript: 广州人细个深信不疑嘅谣言。第一，过膊头底要跳三吓，咪先长唔高。
items.translation_en: Rumors that Guangzhou people believed when they were young. First, if someone passes under your armpit, you must jump three times, otherwise you won't grow tall.
items.description: Uses Cantonese terms like '细个' (when small/young) and '咪先' (otherwise), and '膊头' (shoulder).

items.title: 广州人小时候“深信不疑”的谣言
items.transcript: 第三，坐人哋啱啱坐过嘅凳会生痔疮。
items.translation_en: Third, sitting on a stool that someone else just sat on will cause hemorrhoids.
items.description: Includes Cantonese grammar and vocabulary such as '人哋' (others) and '啱啱' (just now).

items.title: 广州人小时候“深信不疑”的谣言
items.transcript: 第四，食饭食唔干净，大个会嫁个痘皮老公。
items.translation_en: Fourth, if you don't eat all your rice, you'll marry a husband with a pitted face when you grow up.
items.description: Features the Cantonese dialect word '痘皮' (referring to skin pitted by acne or smallpox) and '食唔干净' (not eating cleanly).

items.title: 广州人小时候“深信不疑”的谣言
items.transcript: 第八，吞咗西瓜核会头顶长西瓜。
items.translation_en: Eighth, if you swallow watermelon seeds, a watermelon will grow out of your head.
items.description: Uses the Cantonese verb particle '咗' (completed action) and '核' (seed).

items.title: 广州人小时候“深信不疑”的谣言
items.transcript: 第十五，𠝹死条尾甩咗，会捐入个耳仔入面呀。
items.translation_en: Fifteenth, if a lizard's tail falls off, it will crawl into your ear.
items.description: Uses specific Cantonese terms like '𠝹死' (lizard), '甩' (fall off/detach), and '捐入' (crawl/sneak into).

items.title: 烟台五区六市方言各具特色，你觉得哪里的方言最独特?
items.transcript: 耶了热包谷子，大月姆抓把鞋业，结果後鞋後鞋，胡落八玩儿下洗了。
items.translation_en: Eating hot corn, mother-in-law grabbed some shoes, but ended up stumbling and falling over in a mess.
items.description: Uses Fushan-specific vocabulary like '包谷子' for corn and local colloquialisms for stumbling and falling.

items.title: 烟台五区六市方言各具特色，你觉得哪里的方言最独特?
items.transcript: 那老私所前不好挣，我没卷，我卷还行，我一个月弄攒他个两千七八百块钱。
items.translation_en: Money isn't easy to make these days, I don't work hard, but it's okay, I earn about 2,700 or 2,800 yuan a month.
items.description: Features Laishan dialect terms like '弄攒' for earning/collecting and specific tonal patterns for numbers.

items.title: 烟台五区六市方言各具特色，你觉得哪里的方言最独特?
items.transcript: 你家八个迈... 就是滑倒四个疙瘩... 地瓜水饺。
items.translation_en: Your house is eight miles away... slipped on four lumps... sweet potato dumplings.
items.description: Displays the characteristic high-pitched and sharp tonal inflections of the Laiyang dialect.

items.title: 烟台五区六市方言各具特色，你觉得哪里的方言最独特?
items.transcript: 我整叫你雨落死了，你看看你产的宁个袄，就和个死烂斯。
items.translation_en: I'm worried to death about you, look at that coat you're wearing, you look like a complete mess.
items.description: Includes Longkou-specific phonetics like '产' for '穿' (wear) and local insults like '死烂斯'.

items.title: 烟台五区六市方言各具特色，你觉得哪里的方言最独特?
items.transcript: 正吃果渣，媳妇说想吃点小咸菜，我动话二话，我问你上那妈妈间那个加豆子。
items.translation_en: While eating sweet potatoes, my wife said she wanted some pickles, so I immediately asked her to go to the pantry for the fermented beans.
items.description: Uses the Laizhou term '果渣' for sweet potatoes and specific regional names for rooms and food items.

items.title: 骑行陕西省，咸阳市，渭河边看人钓鱼，陕西方言
items.transcript: 大哥我能问一下，那边的木头是现代的还是古代的？
items.translation_en: Brother, can I ask, is that wood over there modern or ancient?
items.description: The speaker uses Guanzhong dialect tones, particularly noticeable in the words 'mu tou' and the ending of the sentence.

items.title: 骑行陕西省，咸阳市，渭河边看人钓鱼，陕西方言
items.transcript: 你是用蚯蚓钓还是用鱼食钓？
items.translation_en: Are you fishing with earthworms or fish bait?
items.description: The pronunciation of 'shí' (food/bait) and the rising intonation on 'ni' are characteristic of the Xianyang local accent.

items.title: 骑行陕西省，咸阳市，渭河边看人钓鱼，陕西方言
items.transcript: 没事干，像没事干。
items.translation_en: Nothing to do, looks like there's nothing to do.
items.description: The phrase 'mó sì gàn' (rendered as 'mei shi gan' in standard Mandarin) is a quintessential Shaanxi dialect expression for having nothing to do.

items.title: 骑行陕西省，咸阳市，渭河边看人钓鱼，陕西方言
items.transcript: 趟了没用。
items.translation_en: It's broken/worn out, it's useless.
items.description: The word 'tang' used in this context and the tonal shift in 'mo yong' are dialect-specific usages common in central Shaanxi.

items.title: 骑行陕西省，咸阳市，渭河边看人钓鱼，陕西方言
items.transcript: 以前货车都从那走，铁柜都不要了。
items.translation_en: Trucks used to pass through there; those iron containers aren't wanted anymore.
items.description: The vowel sounds in 'huo che' and the specific cadence of the sentence reflect the regional Shaanxi linguistic patterns.

items.title: 玩机器闲聊自己方言现状：只会四五句河南话，既不熟悉河南话也不会石家庄话，就很尴尬
items.transcript: 这个人怎么这么意
items.translation_en: Why is this person so showy?
items.description: Uses the local Shijiazhuang word '意' (yi) to describe arrogance.

items.title: 玩机器闲聊自己方言现状：只会四五句河南话，既不熟悉河南话也不会石家庄话，就很尴尬
items.transcript: 一号乐内
items.translation_en: (Phonetic local expression)
items.description: Specific non-standard local phrasing.

items.title: 玩机器闲聊自己方言现状：只会四五句河南话，既不熟悉河南话也不会石家庄话，就很尴尬
items.transcript: 他是信阳类的，我是信祥类的
items.translation_en: He is from Xinxiang, I am from Xinxiang.
items.description: Features the 'lei' particle characteristic of the Henan dialect.

items.title: 玩机器闲聊自己方言现状：只会四五句河南话，既不熟悉河南话也不会石家庄话，就很尴尬
items.transcript: 信糗... 河南老家骂人还说信糗吗
items.translation_en: Xinqiu... do people in Henan still use 'xinqiu' as an insult?
items.description: Discusses 'xinqiu', a specific Henan dialect term used for insults.

items.title: 玩机器闲聊自己方言现状：只会四五句河南话，既不熟悉河南话也不会石家庄话，就很尴尬
items.transcript: 没人会说板面，都是板儿面... 你板儿逼昨天肯定撸管了
items.translation_en: Nobody says banmian, they all say banr-mian... You definitely masturbated yesterday.
items.description: Demonstrates the heavy retroflex (erhua) and slang unique to Shijiazhuang/Hebei dialect.

items.title: 1981年 台南 學甲 慈濟宮 保生大帝 廟會慶典 （國語，閩南語介紹）
items.transcript: 藝陣隊伍大部分也攏經過化妝，佩帶鑼鼓佮道具，唱歌跳舞，充分表現出地頭閣有民間藝術的精雕。
items.translation_en: Most of the parade groups undergo makeup, carry gongs, drums, and props, singing and dancing, fully demonstrating the local folk art's refinement.
items.description: The narrator switches from Mandarin to Taiwanese Hokkien to describe the local performers.

items.title: 1981年 台南 學甲 慈濟宮 保生大帝 廟會慶典 （國語，閩南語介紹）
items.transcript: 這是凱地寮的牛犁歌，有牛有犁，表現出過去的農村精雕。
items.translation_en: This is the 'Cattle Plow Song' from Kaidi Liao, featuring cattle and plows, representing scenes of past rural life.
items.description: Uses specific Minnan agricultural and cultural terminology within a dialectal sentence structure.

items.title: 1981年 台南 學甲 慈濟宮 保生大帝 廟會慶典 （國語，閩南語介紹）
items.transcript: 這是公華參加的蘇蘭小姐出嫁，閣有藝閣、藝陣，又閣在慈濟宮前...
items.translation_en: This is the 'Miss Su Lan Getting Married' performance from Gonghua, along with floats and parade groups, once again in front of Ciji Temple...
items.description: The description uses traditional Hokkien terms for temple parade arts like 'Yi-ge' and 'Yi-zhen'.

items.title: 1981年 台南 學甲 慈濟宮 保生大帝 廟會慶典 （國語，閩南語介紹）
items.transcript: 攑旗、佮遮省太子爺轎前隊，... 鬧熱的人陣...
items.translation_en: Carrying flags, along with the escort team in front of the Prince's palanquin... a bustling crowd...
items.description: Features vernacular Minnan terms for 'carrying' and 'bustling' typical of Tainan Hokkien.

items.title: 1981年 台南 學甲 慈濟宮 保生大帝 廟會慶典 （國語，閩南語介紹）
items.transcript: 一陣一陣的藝陣，一閣一閣的藝閣，相連紲排列，表現出對神的尊敬佮感謝。
items.translation_en: Group after group of performers and float after float are lined up in succession, showing respect and gratitude to the gods.
items.description: A formal religious description provided in fluent Taiwanese Hokkien.

items.title: 济南城市推荐官
items.transcript: 高铁站那边。
items.translation_en: Over at the high-speed rail station.
items.description: Uses a strong local accent with specific tonal shifts characteristic of Shandong dialects.

items.title: 济南城市推荐官
items.transcript: 那边可以坐高铁上济南。
items.translation_en: You can take the high-speed rail to Jinan from there.
items.description: The word '上' (shàng) is used in a dialectal sense to mean 'going to', and the pronunciation of '济南' reflects regional phonology.

items.title: 济南城市推荐官
items.transcript: 那边是火车站也能上济南。
items.translation_en: That's the railway station, you can also go to Jinan.
items.description: The speaker uses local grammar and a heavy Shandong accent, particularly the use of '上' as a directional verb for travel.

items.title: 2024.02.09尹妹《至少还有你》《男孩》《活着》《当你》《如愿》《牡丹江》《花海》《爱的飞行日记》《恭喜发财》《小嫦娥》《念诗之王》（游戏档：方言传声筒）
items.transcript: 老铁们，天花板来了！
items.translation_en: Hey buddies, the best of the best is here!
items.description: The use of '老铁' (Lao Tie) is a quintessentially Northeastern Mandarin term for close friends or audience members.

items.title: 2024.02.09尹妹《至少还有你》《男孩》《活着》《当你》《如愿》《牡丹江》《花海》《爱的飞行日记》《恭喜发财》《小嫦娥》《念诗之王》（游戏档：方言传声筒）
items.transcript: 你听不懂你就模仿克勒说就行。
items.translation_en: If you can't understand it, just imitate how Kele says it.
items.description: The phrase ends with a distinct Northeastern lilt on '就行' (jiu xing), often used to dismiss complexity.

items.title: 2024.02.09尹妹《至少还有你》《男孩》《活着》《当你》《如愿》《牡丹江》《花海》《爱的飞行日记》《恭喜发财》《小嫦娥》《念诗之王》（游戏档：方言传声筒）
items.transcript: 你搁这合着学我呢？
items.translation_en: Are you just here imitating me then?
items.description: The term '搁这' (ge zhe) is a typical Northeastern Mandarin marker for 'here' or 'currently doing,' combined with a specific interrogative tone.

items.title: 2024.02.09尹妹《至少还有你》《男孩》《活着》《当你》《如愿》《牡丹江》《花海》《爱的飞行日记》《恭喜发财》《小嫦娥》《念诗之王》（游戏档：方言传声筒）
items.transcript: 你听我这个整得你跟听克勒老师那个效果是一模一样的。
items.translation_en: Listen to how I did this, it has the exact same effect as Teacher Kele's version.
items.description: The verb '整' (zheng) is the most versatile and characteristic verb in Northeastern dialects, used here to mean 'did/performed'.

items.title: 2024.02.09尹妹《至少还有你》《男孩》《活着》《当你》《如愿》《牡丹江》《花海》《爱的飞行日记》《恭喜发财》《小嫦娥》《念诗之王》（游戏档：方言传声筒）
items.transcript: 哎呀，2.5了家人，掉牙掉牙。
items.translation_en: Oh my, it's 2.5 now guys, losing points, losing points.
items.description: The emphatic '哎呀' (ai ya) and the repetitive '掉牙' (diao ya) delivered with a sharp Northeastern cadence reflect regional speech patterns.

items.title: 中国最难懂四川话，南充凉山话韵味十足，达州宜宾话完全听不懂！
items.transcript: 我是四川人，四川嘞样嘞，四川话是这么说，听说是挺左。
items.translation_en: I'm from Sichuan, Sichuan is like this, this is how Sichuanese is spoken, I heard it's quite clumsy.
items.description: Uses distinctive Sichuan regional particles like '嘞' (lei) and '左' (zuo) with a clear Nanchong/Sichuan accent.

items.title: 中国最难懂四川话，南充凉山话韵味十足，达州宜宾话完全听不懂！
items.transcript: 你是啥子回事？哎呀死妈，死妈你看到没得？
items.translation_en: What is wrong with you? Oh my, mother, did you see that?
items.description: Features strong Sichuanese 'shazi' (what) and 'meide' (not have/no), delivered in a dramatic regional tone.

items.title: 中国最难懂四川话，南充凉山话韵味十足，达州宜宾话完全听不懂！
items.transcript: 厕所在哪儿？厕所在那儿。厕所厕所厕所在那儿。
items.translation_en: Where is the bathroom? The bathroom is over there. The bathroom is over there.
items.description: Demonstrates the specific local pronunciation of 'Cesuozaner' (bathroom is there) typical of Chengdu and Nanchong dialects.

items.title: 中国最难懂四川话，南充凉山话韵味十足，达州宜宾话完全听不懂！
items.transcript: 成都的小龙虾不好吃吗？你等个回事嘛。
items.translation_en: Isn't Chengdu's crayfish delicious? Just see what happens.
items.description: Uses the dialectal ending particle 'ma' and the phrasing 'huishi' (what's the matter/happening) with a Sichuanese lilt.

items.title: 中国最难懂四川话，南充凉山话韵味十足，达州宜宾话完全听不懂！
items.transcript: 打你促，打你促。这道题稳了，送分题，又或者说是四川人。
items.translation_en: Beat you up, beat you up. This question is certain, a giveaway, or it's just being a Sichuanese person.
items.description: Features the colloquial Sichuan exclamation 'Da ni cu' which is characteristic of the regional aggressive yet humorous style.

items.title: 周深呐！我在哈尔滨这旮沓贼拉想你～尊嘟很喜欢宝贝讲方言啊！！！东北话get✓
items.transcript: 哈尔滨的铁子们
items.translation_en: My friends in Harbin
items.description: Uses 'tie zi' (铁子), a quintessential Northeastern slang term for close friends or 'bros'.

items.title: 周深呐！我在哈尔滨这旮沓贼拉想你～尊嘟很喜欢宝贝讲方言啊！！！东北话get✓
items.transcript: 我来这旮沓看你们来了
items.translation_en: I've come to this place to see you all
items.description: Uses 'zhe ga da' (这旮沓), which is a characteristic Dongbei expression meaning 'this place'.

items.title: 周深呐！我在哈尔滨这旮沓贼拉想你～尊嘟很喜欢宝贝讲方言啊！！！东北话get✓
items.transcript: 我刚才撒摸了一下
items.translation_en: I just took a quick look around
items.description: Uses the dialectal verb 'sa mu' (撒摸), which means to glance around or observe one's surroundings.

items.title: 周深呐！我在哈尔滨这旮沓贼拉想你～尊嘟很喜欢宝贝讲方言啊！！！东北话get✓
items.transcript: 今天来的人不老少啊
items.translation_en: Quite a lot of people came today
items.description: Uses 'bu lao shao' (不老少), a common regional phrase meaning 'many' or 'a significant amount'.

items.title: 其实秦皇岛方言老多种了 我只会说偏东北话的这一种
items.transcript: 他嘴里叼个下巴子，往长城海里欻
items.translation_en: He has his chin sticking out and is splashing into the sea by the Great Wall.
items.description: Uses '下巴子' (xiàba zi) for chin and the dialectal verb '欻' (chuā) meaning to splash or move quickly, which are characteristic of Northern/Northeastern dialects.

items.title: 其实秦皇岛方言老多种了 我只会说偏东北话的这一种
items.transcript: 他就是嫌我天流哈喇子
items.translation_en: He just dislikes me for drooling every day.
items.description: '哈喇子' (hā lá zi) is a very common dialect word for drool or saliva in Northern China, especially in Hebei and the Northeast.

items.title: 其实秦皇岛方言老多种了 我只会说偏东北话的这一种
items.transcript: 是五迷三道灯火把
items.translation_en: Being all confused and dazed like a flickering torch.
items.description: The idiom '五迷三道' (wǔ mí sān dào) is a local colloquialism used to describe someone who is dazed, confused, or acting erratically.

items.title: 其实秦皇岛方言老多种了 我只会说偏东北话的这一种
items.transcript: 眼儿大一分钱没
items.translation_en: Having big eyes but not a single penny to his name.
items.description: The sentence structure and the use of the rhotic '儿' (erhua) sound in '眼儿' are typical of the regional rhythmic speech patterns found in the Qinhuangdao area.

items.title: 咦~还正搁床上躺住嘞，赶紧起来吧！ #河南方言#河南dou知道#
items.transcript: 咦，我那个呵呀！
items.translation_en: Yi! Oh my goodness!
items.description: Uses 'Yi', the most iconic Henan interjection used for surprise, emphasis, or drawing attention.

items.title: 咦~还正搁床上躺住嘞，赶紧起来吧！ #河南方言#河南dou知道#
items.transcript: 还正搁床上躺住嘞，还没起来嘞，还这儿梦着嘞，赶紧起来吧！
items.translation_en: Still lying on the bed? Not up yet? Still dreaming? Get up quickly!
items.description: Uses '搁' (ge) instead of '在' (zai) as a locational preposition and the final particle '嘞' (le), which are both characteristic of Central Plains Mandarin.

items.title: 咦~还正搁床上躺住嘞，赶紧起来吧！ #河南方言#河南dou知道#
items.transcript: 穿上鞋大大方方把你给活捉。
items.translation_en: Put on your shoes and [I'll] catch you fair and square.
items.description: Features the distinctive rhythmic cadence and phonetic pronunciation typical of the Zhengzhou/Henan region.

items.title: 【柔柔助眠】当你惹你的石家庄女朋友生气/轻语/方言/搓手
items.transcript: 你别来我面前晃悠啊，真咧，可麻烦咧。
items.translation_en: Don't come hovering around me, seriously, it's so annoying.
items.description: Uses the characteristic Shijiazhuang ending particle '咧' (liě) and a specific localized intonation for annoyance.

items.title: 【柔柔助眠】当你惹你的石家庄女朋友生气/轻语/方言/搓手
items.transcript: 你早干嘛咧了？你干这事就不能跟我说一声，说一声能糟了，能累死你啊？
items.translation_en: What were you doing earlier? Couldn't you have told me before doing this? Would saying something have killed you?
items.description: Includes '干嘛咧' (gànmá liě) and the dialectal usage of '糟了' (zāole) to imply a major hassle or ruinous trouble.

items.title: 【柔柔助眠】当你惹你的石家庄女朋友生气/轻语/方言/搓手
items.transcript: 你这啥子突然情况啊？要你睡觉了你是嘎崩一下子死过去了？你突然一下被人打了一拳你没自觉了？
items.translation_en: What's this 'sudden situation'? You fell asleep or did you just drop dead suddenly? Were you punched and lost consciousness?
items.description: The phrase '嘎崩一下子' (gābēng yīxiàzi) is a very local way to describe a sudden, abrupt action, delivered with a strong northern accent.

items.title: 【柔柔助眠】当你惹你的石家庄女朋友生气/轻语/方言/搓手
items.transcript: 还当我是三岁小孩，我已经24岁了，我不是18岁，18岁我也不会让你有三个字糊弄我。
items.translation_en: You still think I'm a three-year-old? I'm already 24, not 18. Even at 18, I wouldn't let you fool me with just three words.
items.description: Features heavy Shijiazhuang-style pronunciation of numbers and the verb '糊弄' (hùnong) with local tonal shifts.

items.title: 【柔柔助眠】当你惹你的石家庄女朋友生气/轻语/方言/搓手
items.transcript: 你说这老婆，你肯定也说，你肯定没说他，也麻烦说人，可能人家也不是故意的。
items.translation_en: You call me 'wife', you definitely said it... but it's a bother to scold them, maybe they didn't mean it.
items.description: The word '老婆' (lǎopó) and the sentence structures '也麻烦说人' show distinct Shijiazhuang grammatical habits and vowels.

items.title: 方言吟诵《岳阳楼记》
items.transcript: 用我们巴陵话，报普读一段《岳阳楼记》。
items.translation_en: Using our Baling dialect, I will read a segment of 'Memorial to Yueyang Tower'.
items.description: The speaker explicitly identifies the dialect as Baling (Yueyang) and uses a strong local accent in the spoken introduction.

items.title: 方言吟诵《岳阳楼记》
items.transcript: 庆历四年春，滕子京谪守巴陵郡。
items.translation_en: In the spring of the fourth year of the Qingli reign, Teng Zijing was banished to the Baling Prefecture.
items.description: The pronunciation of 'chun' and 'jun' demonstrates local vowel characteristics and tonal contours specific to the Yueyang region.

items.title: 方言吟诵《岳阳楼记》
items.transcript: 至若春和景明，波澜不惊，上下天光，一碧万顷。
items.translation_en: As for the time when the spring is mild and the sun is bright, the waves are calm, the sky and water reflect each other, a vast expanse of emerald.
items.description: The traditional chanting style follows the local tone system, particularly evident in the treatment of flat and rising tones.

items.title: 方言吟诵《岳阳楼记》
items.transcript: 则有去国怀乡，忧谗畏讥，满目萧然，感极而悲者矣。
items.translation_en: Then there are feelings of leaving the capital and longing for home, fearing slander and mockery, with desolation everywhere, leading to profound sadness.
items.description: Displays distinctive local pronunciation of retroflex initials like 'sh' and 'zh', which shift towards dental sounds in this dialect.

items.title: 方言吟诵《岳阳楼记》
items.transcript: 先天下之忧而忧，后天下之乐而乐。
items.translation_en: To worry before the world worries, and to rejoice after the world rejoices.
items.description: The emotional climax shows heavy dialect influence on final vowels and rhythmic stresses characteristic of the Hunan/Xiang dialect family.

items.title: 这口重庆方言也太舒服了吧！被罚出来的祝福反而成了“
items.transcript: 万山演义，华球亮，宇宙灯火，迎吉祥。祝大家新年快乐，万事如意。
items.translation_en: The mountains perform, the flowers glow, the universe is lit with lanterns to welcome auspiciousness. Happy New Year to everyone, may all your wishes come true.
items.description: The speaker uses distinctive Chongqing phonetic characteristics, such as the specific tonal shifts and a rhythmic, fast-paced intonation typical of Southwestern Mandarin.

items.title: 中国最好听方言四川话，成都绵阳口音委婉动听，泸州口音韵味十足
items.transcript: Kexite? 膝盖。
items.translation_en: Kexite? It means knee.
items.description: Uses the highly localized term 'Kexite' which is the unique Sichuan dialect word for 'knee'.

items.title: 中国最好听方言四川话，成都绵阳口音委婉动听，泸州口音韵味十足
items.transcript: 营养师亲雅记在十二月二十五号上映了。
items.translation_en: The nutritionist's elegant record was released on December 25th.
items.description: Wang Ziwen, who is from Mianyang, uses a distinct Sichuanese tone and phonetic variation on standard Mandarin words.

items.title: 中国最好听方言四川话，成都绵阳口音委婉动听，泸州口音韵味十足
items.transcript: 巴适就是很好的意思。味道很巴适。
items.translation_en: ‘Bashi’ means very good. The taste is excellent.
items.description: Explains and uses 'Bashi', the most iconic and frequently used word in Sichuan dialects to describe comfort or excellence.

items.title: 中国最好听方言四川话，成都绵阳口音委婉动听，泸州口音韵味十足
items.transcript: 爸爸妈妈要吃饭了。
items.translation_en: Mom and Dad are going to eat.
items.description: A child speaks with a heavy Sichuan regional accent, characterized by specific tonal shifts typical of the Mianyang/Chengdu area.

items.title: 中国最好听方言四川话，成都绵阳口音委婉动听，泸州口音韵味十足
items.transcript: 五号大到。五号大到。
items.translation_en: Number five broad road. Number five broad road.
items.description: Mimics the rhythmic and tonal style of traditional Chengdu public transport announcements in the local dialect.

items.title: 湘语长益片-株洲
items.transcript: 昨日子下了一点大雨，我没带伞。
items.translation_en: It rained a bit yesterday, but I didn't bring an umbrella.
items.description: The word '昨日子' is a dialectal variation of 'yesterday', and the pronunciation of '伞' (umbrella) reflects the unique phonology of the Zhuzhou region.

items.title: 湘语长益片-株洲
items.transcript: 你恰饭还是恰馒头？
items.translation_en: Are you eating rice or steamed buns?
items.description: The word '恰' (qià) is used instead of the standard '吃' (chī) for 'to eat', which is a quintessential feature of Xiang dialects.

items.title: 湘语长益片-株洲
items.transcript: 你在个哩等什么罗？我没等呢，我在个哩看老人呢。
items.translation_en: What are you waiting for here? I'm not waiting, I'm here watching the elderly.
items.description: The phrase '个哩' is the local term for 'here', and the use of final modal particles like '罗' and '呢' is characteristic of regional speech.

items.title: 湘语长益片-株洲
items.transcript: 你只恰了一碗饭，还恰一碗不？
items.translation_en: You only ate one bowl of rice, do you want to eat another?
items.description: Repeated use of '恰' for eating and the 'A-not-A' or simple '不' question structure are prominent in this dialect.

items.title: 湘语长益片-株洲
items.transcript: 你比我高些，他比你还高些。
items.translation_en: You are a bit taller than me, and he is even taller than you.
items.description: Using '些' (xiē) as a comparative suffix for 'a bit more' is common in Southern Chinese dialects like Zhuzhou Xiang.

items.title: 广东珠海淇澳话·语法例句
items.transcript: 阿莊，枕麼跌多多魚？呀麼跌多。
items.translation_en: Ah Zhuang, how many fish did you catch? Not many.
items.description: Features the dialect-specific interrogative '枕麼' (how much/many) and the verb '跌' (to catch).

items.title: 广东珠海淇澳话·语法例句
items.transcript: 你嚇羹書，共過幫你天麼啊？共過啦，呀共過幫我齋啦。
items.translation_en: Has he told you about this book? Yes, he has.
items.description: Uses '羹' for 'this' and '共' for 'talk/tell,' which are distinctive lexical items in Qi'ao speech.

items.title: 广东珠海淇澳话·语法例句
items.transcript: 你十幫，閒氏食饅頭啊。
items.translation_en: Are you eating bread or steamed buns?
items.description: Uses the unique dialect conjunction '閒氏' meaning 'or'.

items.title: 广东珠海淇澳话·语法例句
items.transcript: 集羹衣末個配，北個衣末食。
items.translation_en: Wear these clothes, don't wear those.
items.description: Demonstrates the specific local pronouns for 'these' (集羹) and 'those' (北個).

items.title: 广东珠海淇澳话·语法例句
items.transcript: 我敢個依，圍浪都敢個系得個狼。
items.translation_en: I say it's him, everyone says it's him.
items.description: The term '圍浪' (everyone) is a characteristic pronoun usage in the Qi'ao dialect.

items.title: 江西应该大部分地区都能听懂南昌话吧！
items.transcript: 我咯，白痴啊你个！
items.translation_en: Oh man, you idiot!
items.description: Uses the local emphatic particle '我咯' (Wo lo) and distinct regional intonation typical of Nanchang speakers expressing frustration.

items.title: 江西应该大部分地区都能听懂南昌话吧！
items.transcript: 我话的南昌话，你干嘛现在又听不懂呢？
items.translation_en: I am speaking Nanchang dialect, why can't you understand it now?
items.description: Uses '话' (wa) as a verb meaning 'to say' or 'to speak', which is a classic marker of the Gan (Nanchang) dialect instead of standard Mandarin '说' (shuō).

items.title: 江西应该大部分地区都能听懂南昌话吧！
items.transcript: 南昌话是不？
items.translation_en: Nanchang dialect, right?
items.description: The phonetic delivery of '是不' (shì bù) as a tag question follows the specific rhythmic patterns of Nanchang colloquial speech.

items.title: 江西应该大部分地区都能听懂南昌话吧！
items.transcript: 对咯你个，没得命！
items.translation_en: Oh you, it's unbearable!
items.description: Contains the regional idiom '没得命' (méi dé mìng), commonly used in Jiangxi to mean 'terrible' or 'unbearable', delivered with a strong local accent.

items.title: 《打火机》潍坊天气版
items.transcript: 潍坊的个天气哟，风来像傻逼
items.translation_en: The weather in Weifang, the wind makes you look like an idiot.
items.description: Specific pronunciation of 'Weifang' and the use of the local modal particle '个' and dialectal tone for '傻逼'.

items.title: 《打火机》潍坊天气版
items.transcript: 三伏天热死43度全国第一
items.translation_en: The heat in the dog days is 43 degrees, ranked first in the nation.
items.description: The accent features strong 's' sounds and tonal shifts characteristic of Shandong dialects.

items.title: 《打火机》潍坊天气版
items.transcript: 秋雨一趟寒就方屁，温度孩三是几
items.translation_en: Saying an autumn rain brings cold is nonsense; the temperature is still in the 30s.
items.description: The word '方屁' (nonsense) and '孩' (instead of '还', meaning still) are distinct local dialect markers.

items.title: ［明日方舟］望你还是别讲长沙话了不然我要笑死
items.transcript: 害引功夫几载早的工资，几百年见冇得得到。
items.translation_en: Spent so much effort for this little salary, haven't received it in hundreds of years.
items.description: The phrase 'Mao de' (haven't/nothing) and the specific regional phonetic realization of 'gong zi' are classic Changsha dialect markers.

items.title: ［明日方舟］望你还是别讲长沙话了不然我要笑死
items.transcript: 我不听得你港滴，分身佛蛇神么子。
items.translation_en: I don't listen to what you say, what clones or Buddhas.
items.description: The speaker uses 'gang' (to speak/say) and 'shen mo zi' (what), which are signature lexical items in the Changsha/Xiang dialect group.

items.title: ［明日方舟］望你还是别讲长沙话了不然我要笑死
items.transcript: 你们要是不得攒头冇得，故意惹事跑不脱滴。
items.translation_en: If you have no sense and intentionally cause trouble, you won't escape.
items.description: Features the dialectal 'mao de' and the distinct local pronunciation of 'pao bu tuo' (cannot escape).

items.title: ［明日方舟］望你还是别讲长沙话了不然我要笑死
items.transcript: 真滴算句一，有点意思。
items.translation_en: Truly interesting, it's got some meaning.
items.description: Shows the characteristically soft 'z/zh' merger and local tonal inflections typical of the Hunan region.

items.title: ［明日方舟］望你还是别讲长沙话了不然我要笑死
items.transcript: 你冇得攒钱的习惯。
items.translation_en: You don't have the habit of saving money.
items.description: The substitution of the Mandarin 'mei you' with the regional 'mao de' is a primary identifier for Changsha speech.

items.title: 都是金华人为什么不说方言
items.transcript: 阿拉公司，已经是金华尼写尼话，我这里的服务蛮多，个个洗车、保养、油漆、钣金、一条龙服务。
items.translation_en: Our company is run by Jinhua people. We have a lot of services here, including car washing, maintenance, painting, bodywork, a one-stop service.
items.description: Uses the Wu-specific pronoun '阿拉' (we/our) and Jinhua-specific pronunciation for 'Jinhua' and 'service'.

items.title: 都是金华人为什么不说方言
items.transcript: 呀呀呀到我有路什么讲我些跨我些靠包呀啊，有拿公利各免费休息下，我有... 卢香19，呀到我有1491一个面包又切。
items.translation_en: Oh oh oh, let me tell you what else we have, we have a free rest area, we have... snacks, and we have bread to eat.
items.description: Features heavy Jinhua dialect phonology with distinct vowel shifts and rapid tonal transitions typical of the region.

items.title: 都是金华人为什么不说方言
items.transcript: 我有位学多个服务，动拉车看给学阿拉车哇免费分钟看，来做十个，两个小时八分钟半斤油漆，全部搞定。
items.translation_en: I have many more services, while you wait for the car you can watch things for free, in two hours and eight minutes the paint work is all done.
items.description: Uses Jinhua-specific syntax and particles for time and completion, along with local vocabulary for automotive maintenance.

items.title: 南普×南宁白话的精华都在这里了
items.transcript: 501呀，救火呀，救火呀！
items.translation_en: Room 501, help with the fire! Help!
items.description: The pronunciation of '救火' (save/extinguish fire) is spoken with a distinct Nanning Cantonese (Baihua) accent and tone.

items.title: 南普×南宁白话的精华都在这里了
items.transcript: 睇到，凶惨呀，真系恐怖啊滴嘢啊。
items.translation_en: Look at that, it's brutal, these things are really terrifying.
items.description: Uses Nanning Cantonese vocabulary such as '睇到' (look) and '滴嘢' (these things) with local intonation.

items.title: 南普×南宁白话的精华都在这里了
items.transcript: 很恐怖的呀，我们这里有没有影响的嘎？
items.translation_en: It's so scary, will our place be affected?
items.description: The use of the sentence-final particle 'ga' (嘎) and the 'singsong' intonation are typical markers of Nanning Mandarin (Nanpu).

items.title: 南普×南宁白话的精华都在这里了
items.transcript: 救火车还不快来，天呐黑你！
items.translation_en: Why aren't the fire trucks here yet? My goodness!
items.description: The phrase '黑你' (hei ni) is a classic Nanning Mandarin slang exclamation used to express shock or surprise.

items.title: 南普×南宁白话的精华都在这里了
items.transcript: 不拍了不拍了，我也要走了。
items.translation_en: Stopping the recording, I have to leave too.
items.description: The speaker uses the typical 'Nanpu' accent, characterized by softened consonants and specific southern tonal inflections.

items.title: 豆包说吉林方言
items.transcript: 老奶奶，你走道咋不瞅着地呢，踩我脚了。
items.translation_en: Granny, why aren't you looking at the ground when you walk? You stepped on my foot.
items.description: Uses '走道' (walking), '咋' (how/why), and '瞅' (look), which are characteristic of Northeastern/Jilin dialects.

items.title: 豆包说吉林方言
items.transcript: 老奶奶，你走道咋就不长眼睛呢，硬是踩着我脚了。
items.translation_en: Granny, why aren't you looking where you're going? You really stepped right on my foot.
items.description: Features colloquial phrasing like '不长眼睛' and '走道/咋' with a strong regional accent.

items.title: 王心凌的合肥方言讲得如何？你们可别又在网上吐槽她塑料方言了
items.transcript: 我好死哄你们啊
items.translation_en: I love you all so much.
items.description: '死哄' (sǐ hōng) is a specific Hefei dialect expression meaning 'to like' or 'to love'.

items.title: 王心凌的合肥方言讲得如何？你们可别又在网上吐槽她塑料方言了
items.transcript: 你们死不是死哄我啊
items.translation_en: Do you like me or not?
items.description: Repetition of the dialect term '死哄' (sǐ hōng).

items.title: 王心凌的合肥方言讲得如何？你们可别又在网上吐槽她塑料方言了
items.transcript: 从肥东到肥西，买了一只老母鸡
items.translation_en: From Feidong to Feixi, I bought an old hen.
items.description: This is a quintessential Hefei dialect rhyme often used to showcase the local accent's specific tones and phonetics.

items.title: 王心凌的合肥方言讲得如何？你们可别又在网上吐槽她塑料方言了
items.transcript: 拿到胡里撕一撕，除了骨头就是皮
items.translation_en: Take it to the lake to tear it apart, it's nothing but skin and bones.
items.description: Continuation of the iconic Hefei regional rhyme with dialect-specific pronunciation.

items.title: 【金宝暖方言a】更新啦，赶紧来围观吧！
items.transcript: 那随手丢垃圾不是很正常吗？那是垃圾堆。
items.translation_en: Isn't it normal to just throw trash whenever? That is a trash heap.
items.description: Features a strong Southern Chinese dialectal accent and specific intonation common in Cantonese-influenced regions.

items.title: 【金宝暖方言a】更新啦，赶紧来围观吧！
items.transcript: 三胖子，你好意思讲我！怎么了，这里面没有你吗？那我里面是不是跟着你的？我一直跟着你呀！
items.translation_en: Fatty, you have the nerve to lecture me! What, aren't you in this video? Wasn't I just following you in there? I've been following you!
items.description: The sentence structure ('那我里面是不是跟着你的') and colloquial vocabulary are characteristic of local vernacular grammar in Southern China.

items.title: 尔滨人说话，有的时候也挺委婉的！！！
items.transcript: 那玩意儿跟烧麦里边放地瓜米一机样，瞎扯。
items.translation_en: That thing is just like putting sweet potato rice in shaomai; it's total nonsense.
items.description: Uses the colloquial term '瞎扯' (nonsense) and the regional pronunciation '一机样' (a variation of '一样'), characteristic of informal Northeastern speech.

items.title: 尔滨人说话，有的时候也挺委婉的！！！
items.transcript: 那腐乳都得寻思，我啥前成水果做的了呢？
items.translation_en: Even the fermented bean curd would be wondering, 'Since when was I made of fruit?'
items.description: Includes '寻思' (to wonder/think) and '啥前' (when), both of which are high-frequency, definitive markers of the Northeastern/Harbin dialect.

items.title: 尔滨人说话，有的时候也挺委婉的！！！
items.transcript: 姐妹你别坑你爹了啊，就那草莓馅饺子给你爸吃，你爸都不一定吃。
items.translation_en: Sister, stop screwing over your dad; if you gave those strawberry-filled dumplings to your father, even he wouldn't eat them.
items.description: Uses the slang '坑' (to cheat or screw over) and demonstrates the blunt, humorous rhetorical style typical of the Harbin area.

items.title: 骑行快到宜昌的路上，遇见老乡说起了家乡话
items.transcript: 哦对，我是，因为我老家是宜都。到宜昌市的话是一百公里，然后回我这老家的话还有六十公里。
items.translation_en: Oh yes, I am, because my hometown is Yidu. It's 100 kilometers to Yichang city, and then another 60 kilometers to get back to my hometown here.
items.description: The speaker uses the Yichang/Yidu dialect, a variant of Southwest Mandarin, featuring distinct tonal patterns and local vocabulary like 'laojia'.

items.title: 骑行快到宜昌的路上，遇见老乡说起了家乡话
items.transcript: 哦！您就是专门在这儿等吗？
items.translation_en: Oh! Are you waiting here specifically?
items.description: The cyclist's intonation shifts as he interacts with the local, adopting elements of the regional accent in his response.

items.title: 不是方言没文化，没文化的是自己
items.transcript: 玉米叫路谷
items.translation_en: Corn is called 'lu gu'
items.description: Uses the dialectal term 'lu gu' for maize, which the speaker explains means 'sixth grain'.

items.title: 不是方言没文化，没文化的是自己
items.transcript: 一荽菜，我们一直叫一荽菜
items.translation_en: Yi sui cai, we have always called it 'yi sui cai'
items.description: Uses the local term for coriander, derived from the classical name 'yan sui'.

items.title: 不是方言没文化，没文化的是自己
items.transcript: 叫男人叫奴子家
items.translation_en: Calling men 'nu zi ga'
items.description: A specific dialectal term for males common in the Wuhu region.

items.title: 不是方言没文化，没文化的是自己
items.transcript: 叫女的就叫离今家
items.translation_en: Calling women 'li jin ga'
items.description: A local term for women/wives, which the speaker relates to 'nei jian' (inner chamber personnel).

items.title: 不是方言没文化，没文化的是自己
items.transcript: 今朝，明朝，后朝
items.translation_en: Today, tomorrow, the day after tomorrow
items.description: Uses the character 'zao' (morning/now) to denote days, a classic feature of Wu and Jianghuai dialects.

items.title: 【大连方言配音】大连第一小绿草
items.transcript: 哎呀，我真不俐通你，白听王大爷在那瞎跑。
items.translation_en: Oh, I really don't get you, stop listening to Uncle Wang's nonsense.
items.description: The term '不俐通' (bù lì tōng) is a signature Dalian dialect expression meaning to not understand someone's logic or behavior.

items.title: 【大连方言配音】大连第一小绿草
items.transcript: 别跟我俩耍来子，送完报纸赶紧回来昂。
items.translation_en: Don't play tricks with me, come back quickly after delivering the papers.
items.description: The phrase '耍来子' (shuǎ lái zi) is local Dalian slang for acting out, being naughty, or playing tricks.

items.title: 【大连方言配音】大连第一小绿草
items.transcript: 到人家门口啊，把这报纸握把握把，塞人家门里就行。
items.translation_en: When you get to the door, just crumple the newspaper up and stuff it inside.
items.description: '握把' (wò bā) is a Dalian dialect verb used to describe the action of crumpling or wadding something up.

items.title: 【大连方言配音】大连第一小绿草
items.transcript: 这又撞了飘清了。
items.translation_en: It's been hit so hard it's bruised blue.
items.description: '飘清' (piāo qīng) is a classic Dalian descriptive term for a dark, bluish-green bruise or becoming pale from impact.

items.title: 【大连方言配音】大连第一小绿草
items.transcript: 这大雨试验了呀！
items.translation_en: This heavy rain is intense!
items.description: In Dalian dialect, '试验' (shì yàn) is used colloquially to mean something is extreme, severe, or intense.

items.title: 大理三月街欢迎所有人！
items.transcript: 真的，跑四五个小时，光颠也要开300公里的车，赶三月街。
items.translation_en: Really, running for four or five hours, even just the bumping around, have to drive 300 kilometers just to attend Sanyue Street.
items.description: The word '赶' (gan) used here for attending a fair/market is a characteristic regional usage, and the speaker uses a strong Yunnan/Dali accent.

items.title: 大理三月街欢迎所有人！
items.transcript: 我见到的风是烧烤摊的烟子吹出来的风。
items.translation_en: The wind I see is the wind blown from the smoke of the barbecue stalls.
items.description: The use of '烟子' (yanzi) for smoke is common in Southwestern Mandarin dialects, and the pronunciation of '烧烤' has a distinct local lilt.

items.title: 大理三月街欢迎所有人！
items.transcript: 当然我不是黑大理，因为我自己也算是个大理人，个火。
items.translation_en: Of course I'm not hating on Dali, because I consider myself a Dali person too, buddy.
items.description: The term '个火' (ge huo) is a specific Dali dialect slang term meaning 'friend' or 'buddy'.

items.title: 大理三月街欢迎所有人！
items.transcript: 但是真的各位来到三月街赶街子的游客，文明出行，文明赶街。
items.translation_en: But really, for all the tourists coming to Sanyue Street to attend the fair, please travel civilly and attend the fair civilly.
items.description: The phrase '赶街子' (gan jie zi) is the local way of saying 'going to the market' or 'attending a fair'.

items.title: 大理三月街欢迎所有人！
items.transcript: 人看人，人挤人，都在这儿。
items.translation_en: People watching people, people crowding people, all here.
items.description: The pronunciation of '人' (ren) leans towards 'yen' or 'zen', typical of the phonetic shifts in Yunnanese Mandarin.

items.title: 用桂林方言朗诵《桂林山水》#桂林话 桂林人DNA动了，谁懂啊？听一次爱一次
items.transcript: 人们都说：“桂林山水甲天下。”
items.translation_en: People all say: 'Guilin's scenery is the best in the world.'
items.description: The speaker uses the characteristic Guilin dialect tones, particularly on the words 'Guilin' and 'Tianxia'.

items.title: 用桂林方言朗诵《桂林山水》#桂林话 桂林人DNA动了，谁懂啊？听一次爱一次
items.transcript: 漓江的水真静啊。
items.translation_en: The water of the Lijiang River is so quiet.
items.description: The pronunciation of 'shui' (water) and 'jing' (quiet) exhibits specific phonetic shifts typical of Northern Guangxi Southwestern Mandarin.

items.title: 用桂林方言朗诵《桂林山水》#桂林话 桂林人DNA动了，谁懂啊？听一次爱一次
items.transcript: 漓江的水真清啊。
items.translation_en: The water of the Lijiang River is so clear.
items.description: The intonation of 'qing' (clear) and the final particle 'a' are distinctively Guilin-style.

items.title: 用桂林方言朗诵《桂林山水》#桂林话 桂林人DNA动了，谁懂啊？听一次爱一次
items.transcript: 漓江的水真绿啊。
items.translation_en: The water of the Lijiang River is so green.
items.description: The vowel used for 'lv' (green) is pronounced with a local flavor that differs from Standard Mandarin.

items.title: 用桂林方言朗诵《桂林山水》#桂林话 桂林人DNA动了，谁懂啊？听一次爱一次
items.transcript: 船在水中走，人在画中游。
items.translation_en: The boat moves through the water, while people travel through a painting.
items.description: The flow and pitch contours of this poetic phrase are deeply rooted in the local Guilin vernacular rhythm.

items.title: 延吉冷面，左手剪刀，右手筷子
items.transcript: 这冷面必须要剪一下啊，带劲。
items.translation_en: You definitely have to cut these cold noodles; it's great.
items.description: The speaker uses a distinct Northeastern Mandarin accent (Dongbeihua) typical of the Yanji area, specifically the sentence-final particle '啊' and the local slang '带劲' (dàijìn) to express satisfaction.

items.title: 【柔柔助眠】方言轻语聊天/石家庄话
items.transcript: 那咋儿的，那也没法儿。咋儿的，就是那怎么办的意思啊。
items.translation_en: What can you do, there's no way. 'Za'er' means 'what to do' (what to do about it).
items.description: The speaker explicitly defines and uses the local Shijiazhuang dialect term '咋儿的' (za'er de).

items.title: 【柔柔助眠】方言轻语聊天/石家庄话
items.transcript: 我以为通事儿逗我嘞，我赶紧给他打了个电话，我说这是真嘞吗？
items.translation_en: I thought the matter was just a joke, I quickly called him and said 'is this for real?'
items.description: Uses the characteristic '嘞' (lei) particle common in Hebei and Shijiazhuang regional speech instead of the standard '的' or '了'.

items.title: 【柔柔助眠】方言轻语聊天/石家庄话
items.transcript: 上午那个尖儿干完了的意思，就是用普通话说是吧，就是上午把活儿干完了。
items.translation_en: The phrase 'the work (jian'er) was finished in the morning', in Mandarin, means getting the job done in the morning.
items.description: The speaker explains the dialect-specific word '尖儿' (jian'er) used to refer to work or tasks.

items.title: 【柔柔助眠】方言轻语聊天/石家庄话
items.transcript: 我不知道你想干嘛啊，从我上车，就开始玩儿手机。
items.translation_en: I don't know what you were trying to do; from the moment I got in the car, you started playing with your phone.
items.description: The intonation and phonetic delivery of '想干嘛' (xiang gan ma) and '玩儿' (wan'er) reflect North China regional patterns typical of Shijiazhuang.

items.title: 【柔柔助眠】方言轻语聊天/石家庄话
items.transcript: 好嘞五六天了才跟我说，我五语啊，我不知道该做何评价。
items.translation_en: They only told me after five or six days; I'm speechless (wuyu), I don't know how to evaluate it.
items.description: Combines regional particles ('嘞') with local slang/mispronunciations common in casual Shijiazhuang conversation.

items.title: 市民看过纷纷方言吐槽全是“优点”！河南民生新闻报道新国标电动自行车在郑州销售遇冷
items.transcript: 咱这两台新国标，多少得有嘛，咱先摆上，摆上看。
items.translation_en: We have these two new national standard bikes; we have to have some in stock. Let's put them on display for now and see.
items.description: Uses the inclusive 'Zan' (we) and the final particle 'ma' with a distinct Henan intonation typical of Zhengzhou speakers.

items.title: 市民看过纷纷方言吐槽全是“优点”！河南民生新闻报道新国标电动自行车在郑州销售遇冷
items.transcript: 样式还小，还贵，跑得还慢。东西没地方放啊。
items.translation_en: The style is small, it's expensive, and it runs slowly. There's no place to put anything.
items.description: The speaker exhibits the characteristic 'flat' tones and phonetic shifts in vowels common in the Central Plains Mandarin (Zhongyuan Guanhua) spoken in Zhengzhou.

items.title: 市民看过纷纷方言吐槽全是“优点”！河南民生新闻报道新国标电动自行车在郑州销售遇冷
items.transcript: 连个靠背都没有，咱这有两个孩子呢，好叫我我也不选呀，你咋坐呀？
items.translation_en: It doesn't even have a backrest. We have two kids; even if it were given to me, I wouldn't choose it. How are you supposed to sit?
items.description: Features the dialectal word 'za' (how) and the specific use of 'jiao wo' (given to me/for me), delivered with a strong local accent.

items.title: 市民看过纷纷方言吐槽全是“优点”！河南民生新闻报道新国标电动自行车在郑州销售遇冷
items.transcript: 几天没卖出去一个，卖出去一个又给退了... 就咱放到小区地下室哈，你坡儿是完全上不去的。
items.translation_en: We haven't sold one in days; one was sold but then returned... if you put it in the neighborhood basement, you can't get up the ramp at all.
items.description: The pronunciation of 'por' (slope/ramp) with the local rhoticity and the use of 'zan' as a filler/pronoun are hallmarks of Henan dialect.

items.title: 2024.09.13德云社张九龄王九龙呼和浩特相声专场《学方言》
items.transcript: 麦克风... 麦风
items.translation_en: Microphone... [Beijing elision]
items.description: Demonstrates the characteristic elision of middle syllables in the Beijing dialect, colloquially known as 'eating words'.

items.title: 2024.09.13德云社张九龄王九龙呼和浩特相声专场《学方言》
items.transcript: 出租车... 出车
items.translation_en: Taxi... [Beijing elision]
items.description: Shows how the Beijing dialect compresses the three-syllable word for taxi into two syllables.

items.title: 2024.09.13德云社张九龄王九龙呼和浩特相声专场《学方言》
items.transcript: 大家好，我是鹿晗... 大火晚，我是路涵
items.translation_en: Hello everyone, I am Lu Han... [Beijing accent elision]
items.description: A comedic exaggeration of how the Beijing dialect simplifies standard greetings and names through rapid pronunciation and elision.

items.title: 2024.09.13德云社张九龄王九龙呼和浩特相声专场《学方言》
items.transcript: 萨拉黑哟
items.translation_en: Hello / Wassup (Mock Mongolian)
items.description: A phonetic imitation/mockery of Mongolian-influenced greetings common in the Inner Mongolia region where the show is held.

items.title: 2024.09.13德云社张九龄王九龙呼和浩特相声专场《学方言》
items.transcript: 晚安... 巴达一第
items.translation_en: Good night... [Mock Mongolian phonetic]
items.description: The performers provide a phonetic Mongolian equivalent for 'Good night' to appeal to the local Hohhot audience.

items.title: “我们的西北土话” 姥姥姥爷你们怎么说？
items.transcript: 大家好，我是宁夏吴忠的右祥。
items.translation_en: Hello everyone, I'm Youxiang from Wuzhong, Ningxia.
items.description: The speaker introduces himself using the local Wuzhong accent and intonation.

items.title: “我们的西北土话” 姥姥姥爷你们怎么说？
items.transcript: 吴忠这边也是分的，比自家爹大的叫大大爹。
items.translation_en: In Wuzhong, it's also differentiated; those older than one's father are called 'Da Da Die'.
items.description: Uses the dialect-specific term 'Da Da Die' for an elder paternal uncle.

items.title: “我们的西北土话” 姥姥姥爷你们怎么说？
items.transcript: 比自家爹小的就叫爸爸，二爸、三爸、四爸。
items.translation_en: Those younger than one's father are called 'Ba Ba', 'Second Ba', 'Third Ba', 'Fourth Ba'.
items.description: Explains the local nomenclature for paternal uncles younger than the father in Wuzhong.

items.title: “我们的西北土话” 姥姥姥爷你们怎么说？
items.transcript: 吴忠的话舅妈一般就是舅摩。
items.translation_en: In Wuzhong dialect, maternal uncle's wife is usually called 'Jiu Mo'.
items.description: The term 'Jiu Mo' is a phonetic variation of 'Jiu Ma' specific to the region.

items.title: “我们的西北土话” 姥姥姥爷你们怎么说？
items.transcript: 吴忠和中卫差不多，一般情况下叫爷爷和奶奶，在区分的时候才叫外爷外奶奶。
items.translation_en: Wuzhong and Zhongwei are similar; usually they are called grandfather and grandmother, only when distinguishing are they called 'Wai Ye' and 'Wai Nai Nai'.
items.description: Explains the specific usage of 'Wai Ye' and 'Wai Nai Nai' for maternal grandparents in the Wuzhong area.

items.title: “守护粤语”正式进入政府工作报告，市长孙志洋发声定调！这不仅是方言保护，更是广府文化活态传承的里程碑。如今政策“撑腰”，让粤语童谣重回课堂，让新广州人融入本土
items.transcript: 点个碌蔗，又吉利又甜到漏。
items.translation_en: Like a piece of sugarcane, it's lucky and very sweet.
items.description: Features the Cantonese classifier '碌' and the superlative expression '甜到漏', which are characteristic of the dialect.

items.title: “守护粤语”正式进入政府工作报告，市长孙志洋发声定调！这不仅是方言保护，更是广府文化活态传承的里程碑。如今政策“撑腰”，让粤语童谣重回课堂，让新广州人融入本土
items.transcript: 猪笼入水，既形象又有市井智慧。
items.translation_en: Wealth coming from all sides, it's vivid and full of street wisdom.
items.description: Uses the iconic Cantonese idiom '猪笼入水' to describe prosperity.

items.title: “守护粤语”正式进入政府工作报告，市长孙志洋发声定调！这不仅是方言保护，更是广府文化活态传承的里程碑。如今政策“撑腰”，让粤语童谣重回课堂，让新广州人融入本土
items.transcript: 得闲饮茶，四海之内呀，必有人回应你。
items.translation_en: Let's have tea when we're free; someone will always answer.
items.description: Contains '得闲饮茶', the quintessential Cantonese social phrase for casual invitations.

items.title: “守护粤语”正式进入政府工作报告，市长孙志洋发声定调！这不仅是方言保护，更是广府文化活态传承的里程碑。如今政策“撑腰”，让粤语童谣重回课堂，让新广州人融入本土
items.transcript: 靓仔、靓女、多谢。
items.translation_en: Handsome boy, beautiful girl, thank you.
