items.description: Uses standard Cantonese terms for addressing people ('靓仔/靓女') and expressing gratitude ('多谢').

items.title: “守护粤语”正式进入政府工作报告，市长孙志洋发声定调！这不仅是方言保护，更是广府文化活态传承的里程碑。如今政策“撑腰”，让粤语童谣重回课堂，让新广州人融入本土
items.transcript: 由头甜到落尾的幸福。
items.translation_en: Happiness from the very start to the very end.
items.description: Uses the Cantonese structure '由头...到落尾' (from head to tail) to mean from start to finish.

items.title: 昆明超人打击不良烟贩
items.transcript: 我哇些我哇些看孔勒，我是从东郊啊，蔡家村心野，个进来卖的早？
items.translation_en: I'm telling you, look here. I'm from Dongjiao, Caijiacun. Why did I come here to sell so early?
items.description: Uses 'wo wa xie' for 'I say' and 'ge jin lai' as a local question particle/structure typical of Kunming dialect.

items.title: 昆明超人打击不良烟贩
items.transcript: 智慧在胸膛，看我们昆明三害好的不得了，来小弟来点，也是闹卡得。
items.translation_en: Wisdom in our hearts, look at us three evils of Kunming, we're doing great. Come on kid, have some, it's really cool/fancy.
items.description: Includes 'nao ka de', a highly specific Kunming slang term used to describe something impressive, flashy, or even stubborn depending on context.

items.title: 昆明超人打击不良烟贩
items.transcript: 拉骚中，咋得，超你三口颠，你个包，这也是老子地盘。
items.translation_en: You trashy guy, what's up? I'll beat you up, you idiot, this is my territory.
items.description: Features 'la sao zhong' (trashy person) and 'chao ni san kou dian' (a local way of saying I'll beat you), which are unique Kunming insults.

items.title: 昆明超人打击不良烟贩
items.transcript: 哎哟，老子才卡托的一页，就被他抓住孔子了。
items.translation_en: Oh man, I was just acting cool for a second and he caught me red-handed.
items.description: Uses 'ka tuo' (to act cool/show off) and 'zhua zhu kong zi' (to find a loophole or catch someone), characteristic of local phrasing.

items.title: 昆明超人打击不良烟贩
items.transcript: 炒烟嘛炒那波离星，要炒也炒萌的红塔山。
items.translation_en: If you're selling cigarettes, why sell that crappy stuff? If you sell, sell the good Hongtashan.
items.description: Uses 'bo li xing' to describe something of poor quality or messy, and 'chao' instead of 'mai' (sell) in this context.

items.title: 闽南话正在逐步普化，新生派&老旧派~的差别#闽南语实验室 #解锁闽南方言 #趣味闽南话 厦漳泉台·十里不同音#闽南的青年 #闽南乡音传播计划
items.transcript: 老板，头家
items.translation_en: Boss; Master of the house
items.description: Contrast between a Mandarin loanword pronunciation and the traditional Southern Min term 'Tau-ke'.

items.title: 闽南话正在逐步普化，新生派&老旧派~的差别#闽南语实验室 #解锁闽南方言 #趣味闽南话 厦漳泉台·十里不同音#闽南的青年 #闽南乡音传播计划
items.transcript: 休息，休困
items.translation_en: Rest; To stop and sleep/rest
items.description: Comparison of the standard term for rest with the traditional dialectal expression 'Hiauh-kun'.

items.title: 闽南话正在逐步普化，新生派&老旧派~的差别#闽南语实验室 #解锁闽南方言 #趣味闽南话 厦漳泉台·十里不同音#闽南的青年 #闽南乡音传播计划
items.transcript: 晚饭，暗顿
items.translation_en: Dinner; Evening meal
items.description: The speaker demonstrates the traditional 'Am-tng' pronunciation for dinner versus a modern approximation.

items.title: 闽南话正在逐步普化，新生派&老旧派~的差别#闽南语实验室 #解锁闽南方言 #趣味闽南话 厦漳泉台·十里不同音#闽南的青年 #闽南乡音传播计划
items.transcript: 麻烦，费气，费神，较杠
items.translation_en: Troublesome; Exhausting; Complicated
items.description: Explains multiple dialectal variations for 'trouble' depending on the level of complexity or social context.

items.title: 闽南话正在逐步普化，新生派&老旧派~的差别#闽南语实验室 #解锁闽南方言 #趣味闽南话 厦漳泉台·十里不同音#闽南的青年 #闽南乡音传播计划
items.transcript: 新鲜，沁揢
items.translation_en: Fresh
items.description: Shows the significant phonetic difference between the modern loan pronunciation and the traditional local term for freshness.

items.title: 湖北八大难懂方言翻译挑战，天门和咸宁谁更难懂#沙雕动画 #搞笑动画 #湖北方言
items.transcript: 哎呀，你好我扎啊！
items.translation_en: Wow, you're so amazing!
items.description: Features the unique Xianning emphatic particle 'wo za' (我扎) used to express high degree or impressiveness.

items.title: 湖北八大难懂方言翻译挑战，天门和咸宁谁更难懂#沙雕动画 #搞笑动画 #湖北方言
items.transcript: 狗日
items.translation_en: Dog (slang variant)
items.description: A localized pronunciation and expression for 'dog' common in the Xianning region, often used as an informal term or mild curse.

items.title: 湖北八大难懂方言翻译挑战，天门和咸宁谁更难懂#沙雕动画 #搞笑动画 #湖北方言
items.transcript: 你真是个猪头脑壳的相
items.translation_en: You really look like a pig-headed idiot.
items.description: Uses the local idiom 'zhu tou nao ke' (猪头脑壳) and the regional grammatical structure to describe someone as unintelligent.

items.title: 丹东方言版让酒 张起灵听了都想家
items.transcript: 一副好皮相藏着少情况
items.translation_en: A good appearance hides some circumstances.
items.description: The singer uses the specific flat and dipping tones characteristic of the Dandong accent, especially on 'yī fù' and 'qíng kuàng'.

items.title: 丹东方言版让酒 张起灵听了都想家
items.transcript: 清醒拉扯南北去趟河与江
items.translation_en: Awake and pulling between north and south, crossing rivers and streams.
items.description: The pronunciation of 'qù tàng' (go for a trip) uses a local phonetic variation typical of the Northeast/Jiaoliao transition zone.

items.title: 丹东方言版让酒 张起灵听了都想家
items.transcript: 少年心性岁岁长
items.translation_en: The nature of youth grows year by year.
items.description: The word 'zhǎng' (grow) is pronounced with a very heavy, localized diphthong-like quality.

items.title: 丹东方言版让酒 张起灵听了都想家
items.transcript: 你别乐，因为这首歌呢...
items.translation_en: Don't laugh, because this song...
items.description: The word 'lè' (laugh) is used here in a colloquial way common to Dandong conversational speech.

items.title: 丹东方言版让酒 张起灵听了都想家
items.transcript: 所以我就唱哼两句就是得了，哼两句就是得了。
items.translation_en: So I'll just hum a few lines and that's it; just hum a few lines.
items.description: The phrase 'jiù shì dé le' (that's it/enough) is a classic regionalism found in the Dandong/Northeast area.

items.title: 香港人学普通话要花多少钱？
items.transcript: 四百二囉。普通話學習起來比廣東話還要容易。
items.translation_en: It's 420. Learning Mandarin is actually easier than Cantonese.
items.description: The speaker uses the sentence-final particle '囉' (lo), which is characteristic of Hong Kong Cantonese, and exhibits a strong regional accent in their Mandarin pronunciation.

items.title: 香港人学普通话要花多少钱？
items.transcript: 一堂兩百多，一個老師對兩三個小朋友。
items.translation_en: Over two hundred per class, one teacher for two or three children.
items.description: The speaker's Mandarin contains distinctive tonal shifts and prosody influenced by Cantonese phonology.

items.title: 香港人学普通话要花多少钱？
items.transcript: 因為始終我們在香港說廣東話比較多。
items.translation_en: Because after all, we speak Cantonese more in Hong Kong.
items.description: The use of the word '始終' (after all) in this context and the overall sentence structure are heavily influenced by Cantonese grammar.

items.title: 香港人学普通话要花多少钱？
items.transcript: 或是廣東話教中文，就是廣教中。
items.translation_en: Or using Cantonese to teach Chinese, which is 'Cantonese-teaching-Chinese'.
items.description: The speaker refers to the specific regional educational terminology '廣教中' (Gwong Gaau Zung) used in Hong Kong schools.

items.title: 香港人学普通话要花多少钱？
items.transcript: 我就不敢在家說了，我就不跟他在家說了。
items.translation_en: I don't dare speak it at home anymore, I just won't speak it with him at home.
items.description: The speaker's hesitant delivery and specific word choices reflect a typical linguistic environment where Mandarin is a secondary language to Cantonese.

items.title: 新派宁波话和上海话的几个相同演变
items.transcript: 一，一，上海人讲一。
items.translation_en: One, one, Shanghai people say 'yi'.
items.description: Demonstrates the specific pronunciation of the numeral 'one' which varies between the traditional and modern/Shanghai-influenced versions.

items.title: 新派宁波话和上海话的几个相同演变
items.transcript: 这，这，这个，这个。
items.translation_en: This, this, this one, this one.
items.description: Shows the evolution of the demonstrative pronoun 'this' from 'zha' to 'zhe' in regional dialects.

items.title: 新派宁波话和上海话的几个相同演变
items.transcript: 牙，牙，牙齿。
items.translation_en: Tooth, tooth, teeth.
items.description: Illustrates the vowel shift in the word for 'tooth' as used in the Ningbo and Shanghai dialect regions.

items.title: 新派宁波话和上海话的几个相同演变
items.transcript: 奶，奶，奶奶，奶奶。
items.translation_en: Milk/Grandma, milk/grandma, grandma, grandma.
items.description: Focuses on the nasal consonant and vowel merger affecting words like 'milk' or 'grandma'.

items.title: 新派宁波话和上海话的几个相同演变
items.transcript: 女，女，女儿，女儿。
items.translation_en: Female, female, daughter, daughter.
items.description: Provides an example of the 'ü' sound evolution which is a key characteristic distinguishing modern urban dialects in the region.

items.title: 柳州暴躁妹煮饭–花生猪尾汤
items.transcript: 阿爸阿妈今天吃丝马
items.translation_en: Dad and Mom, what are we eating today?
items.description: Uses 'sī mǎ' instead of the standard Mandarin 'shén me' (what), which is a classic marker of the Liuzhou dialect.

items.title: 柳州暴躁妹煮饭–花生猪尾汤
items.transcript: 今天调味大史要煮猪尾巴
items.translation_en: Today the seasoning master is going to cook pig tails
items.description: The word '大师' (master) is pronounced as 'dà shǐ' with a local Liuzhou tonal shift and phonetic variation.

items.title: 柳州暴躁妹煮饭–花生猪尾汤
items.transcript: 注入柳江圣水
items.translation_en: Inject some Liujiang holy water
items.description: Refers to the Liujiang River, a primary geographical feature of Liuzhou, used here humorously as a local cultural identifier.

items.title: 柳州暴躁妹煮饭–花生猪尾汤
items.transcript: 猪尾Q弹，花生软烂
items.translation_en: Pig tail is bouncy, peanuts are soft and tender
items.description: The pronunciation of '软烂' (soft/tender) exhibits the characteristic flattened vowels and pitch contours of the Liuzhou regional accent.

items.title: 柳州暴躁妹煮饭–花生猪尾汤
items.transcript: 吃饭吃饭
items.translation_en: Let's eat, let's eat
items.description: The repetitive phrase shows a distinct Liuzhou tonal pattern where the second word is slightly shortened and pitch-shifted.

items.title: 包头六中元旦迎新晚会 高二年级 声临其境
items.transcript: 大叔，你听，你听我这嗓子。你这发肿了。我也不知道呀，就是昨儿晚上点儿面茶吃过了。
items.translation_en: Uncle, listen, listen to my voice. It's swollen. I don't know why, maybe because I ate some flour tea last night.
items.description: The usage of '昨儿' (yesterday) and the specific mention of '面茶' (flour tea) combined with the characteristic rising-falling tones of the Baotou/Jin dialect.

items.title: 包头六中元旦迎新晚会 高二年级 声临其境
items.transcript: 不着忙，不着忙，你赶紧就存后于点。给我买两包板蓝根。
items.translation_en: No rush, no rush, go to the store quickly. Buy me two packs of Banlangen.
items.description: Uses '不着忙' (no rush) and '赶紧就' with the local accent's specific prosody and tonal markers.

items.title: 包头六中元旦迎新晚会 高二年级 声临其境
items.transcript: 大哥，这厮分明是在找茬。带我将他暴打一顿，轰出安西县便了。
items.translation_en: Brother, this fellow is clearly looking for trouble. Let me beat him up and kick him out of Anxi County.
items.description: The delivery uses a thick, roughened local accent commonly used in the Baotou region for portraying tough characters in parody.

items.title: 包头六中元旦迎新晚会 高二年级 声临其境
items.transcript: 闹呐？还摸啥儿，真的了。
items.translation_en: Are you kidding? What are you still fiddling with? It's for real.
items.description: '闹呐' (Nao na) is a quintessential Baotou/Jin dialect expression for 'Are you kidding/joking?'.

items.title: 包头六中元旦迎新晚会 高二年级 声临其境
items.transcript: 直接乱写！复习那么久，指着数学拿高分，结果一道题直接给我看趴下。清华也去不了，北大更是不消说。
items.translation_en: I just wrote nonsense! I studied for so long, counting on math for a high score, but one problem knocked me down. Can't go to Tsinghua, and Peking University is out of the question.
items.description: The phrase '不消说' and the rhythmic cadence of the complaint are very typical of northern regional dialects centered around Baotou.

items.title: 从前有只南京喵
items.transcript: 奶奶喔，你耳朵怎子尖尖的？
items.translation_en: Grandma, why are your ears so pointy?
items.description: Uses the Nanjing dialect word '怎子' (zěn zǐ) instead of '怎么' (zěn me) for 'why/how', and exhibits the N/L merger in the word '奶奶'.

items.title: 从前有只南京喵
items.transcript: 奶奶，眼珠子怎子圆圆的？
items.translation_en: Grandma, why are your eyeballs so round?
items.description: Repeated use of the dialectal '怎子' and specific low-falling intonation characteristic of the Nanjing region.

items.title: 从前有只南京喵
items.transcript: 奶奶怎子浑身都是毛哦？
items.translation_en: Grandma, why is your whole body covered in fur?
items.description: The sentence structure ending in '哦' and the use of '怎子' are typical of informal Nanjing dialect speech.

items.title: 从前有只南京喵
items.transcript: 原来我奶奶也是小猫咪。
items.translation_en: Turns out my Grandma is also a little kitten.
items.description: The speaker uses distinct Nanjing-style tones, particularly on the words '原来' and '奶奶'.

items.title: 湖北咸宁，哪里女生说话最好听
items.transcript: 我这赤壁话好听吗？我是赤壁个。这个一进小学的小等小啊，然后比小密密个里那个帅，但是那个勾音真的好逗，逗得要命，我真的，我真的悟了。
items.translation_en: Does my Chibi dialect sound good? I'm from Chibi. This kid who just started primary school is small but handsome, but that accent is so funny, it's hilarious. I've really realized it.
items.description: Features the distinct 'ge' (个) suffix and local tonal patterns typical of Chibi City's dialect.

items.title: 湖北咸宁，哪里女生说话最好听
items.transcript: 我是北港话的，我年年不是打工，就是流离，再就是豆腐个闹熟。我想问一下，我是不是在发屁？真的是老火啦！哼！
items.translation_en: I speak Beigang dialect. Every year I'm either working, wandering, or making tofu. I want to ask, am I talking nonsense? It's really frustrating! Hmph!
items.description: Uses specific regional vocabulary like 'fa pi' for nonsense and 'lao huo' for annoying/frustrating, characteristic of Tongcheng County.

items.title: 湖北咸宁，哪里女生说话最好听
items.transcript: 那学生呐要花钱，咸安女呐要花钱，老学啊他是名颜花钱。那女的他去二十个新红城加活个，去哪吃饭呢也要新红帅个，几台饭呐也要新红呀情个。那男的就不用来发声清密，到时呐是新红你仙个。
items.translation_en: Students need money, Xian'an girls need money... and the men don't even have to make a sound, in the end they'll like you, the 'immortal' one.
items.description: Showcases the 'Xian'an' dialect's unique vowel shifts and the repetitive use of local phrasing.

items.title: 湖北咸宁，哪里女生说话最好听
items.transcript: 有你给我洗吗啦，有你给我拿那便友吗啦，我家在食饭呐。哦，不晓得这叫没教果，用普通话这玩意叫什么？
items.translation_en: Can you wash it for me, can you bring that friend for me, I'm eating at home. Oh, I don't know what this is called here, what is this thing called in Mandarin?
items.description: The speaker contrasts her local Chongyang dialect phrasing with Standard Mandarin, highlighting regional grammar particles.

items.title: 湖北咸宁，哪里女生说话最好听
items.transcript: 我发现现在好多人，不给钱怎么离，机倒话显没得近，但是这一倒麻将，几两白比你有劲。那个劲长得累哪个，没得这些个。
items.translation_en: I found many people nowadays, how can they leave without paying... but once they sit for Mahjong, they have more energy than you. Where does that energy come from? There's none of that here.
items.description: Demonstrates the rhythmic and tonal characteristics of Tongshan dialect, particularly in the context of colloquial complaints.

items.title: 杨梅君老师在气功大会上讲话，在汕头
items.transcript: 代表汕头市大雁气功研究会筹备组的全体成员，对支持我们大雁气功工作的单位领导表示衷心的感谢。
items.translation_en: On behalf of all members of the preparatory group for the Shantou Dayan Qigong Research Association, I express my heartfelt gratitude to the leaders of the units supporting our work.
items.description: The introductory speaker delivers Mandarin with a distinct Teochew (Shantou) accent, reflecting the local linguistic environment.

items.title: 杨梅君老师在气功大会上讲话，在汕头
items.transcript: 我的希望，来到汕头，我就传功，为了大家身体健康。
items.translation_en: My hope in coming to Shantou is to teach the practice for the sake of everyone's health.
items.description: The speaker explicitly mentions the target location (Shantou) using her characteristic Northern-influenced phonetic style.

items.title: 杨梅君老师在气功大会上讲话，在汕头
items.transcript: 有人教，汕头有人会教的。希望你们赶紧的报名参加。
items.translation_en: There are people to teach; there are people in Shantou who can teach it. I hope you will sign up and participate quickly.
items.description: This segment highlights the local implementation of the practice in the Shantou region.

items.title: 杨梅君老师在气功大会上讲话，在汕头
items.transcript: 我汕头有几个弟子。以前就有我的弟子来承担，对不对？
items.translation_en: I have several disciples in Shantou. Previously, my disciples have taken on the responsibility, right?
items.description: The master references her lineage and network within the Shantou community.

items.title: 杨梅君老师在气功大会上讲话，在汕头
items.transcript: 我是大雁气功的，这一派，这一派是山派。而且是其代，一千七百多年了。
items.translation_en: I am of the Dayan Qigong school; this sect is a mountain sect. It has a history of over 1,700 years.
items.description: The speaker's unique Northern/Old Beijing accent is a notable contrast to the Shantou setting, providing a clear example of regional speech variation during the event.

items.title: #沧州马姐保险服务#泊头同城#泊头方言#车保险报案#服务
items.transcript: 几个车险没有多少钱的事这哪都一样，你是不是也这么认为的？
items.translation_en: A few car insurance policies aren't worth much, and they're the same everywhere; is that what you think?
items.description: The speaker uses local Botou/Cangzhou intonation patterns, particularly the low-falling tones on specific nouns, and the colloquial 'na dou yi yang' (same everywhere).

items.title: #沧州马姐保险服务#泊头同城#泊头方言#车保险报案#服务
items.transcript: 一般了，我给叫的车险我都告诉客户收藏一下电子保单
items.translation_en: Usually, for the insurance I arrange, I tell clients to save the electronic policy.
items.description: Uses the dialectal 'jiào' in place of 'bàn' or 'mǎi' to describe handling a transaction, typical of Hebei regional speech.

items.title: #沧州马姐保险服务#泊头同城#泊头方言#车保险报案#服务
items.transcript: 真有事的时候他都忘了怎么整了，也找不着保单了
items.translation_en: When something happens, they forget how to deal with it and can't find the policy.
items.description: Contains the versatile Northern verb 'zheng' (to do/handle) and local pronunciation of 'zhao bu zhao'.

items.title: #沧州马姐保险服务#泊头同城#泊头方言#车保险报案#服务
items.transcript: 又是机器人员，电脑机器人的接听，又赶上他那儿还乱
items.translation_en: It was a robotic voice, a computer robot answering, plus it was chaotic on his end.
items.description: Local phrasing 'gan shang' (to happen upon/coincide with) and specific accent markers in the word 'ji qi ren'.

items.title: #沧州马姐保险服务#泊头同城#泊头方言#车保险报案#服务
items.transcript: 在你真正着急的时候谁能帮到你才是最重要的，你说对吧？
items.translation_en: When you're really in a rush, whoever can help you is most important, right?
items.description: The rhythm and the final interrogative particle 'dui ba' carry the distinct cadence of the Cangzhou dialect.

items.title: 排列五《湛江奖门人》
items.transcript: 唷，個車排列五，呀星之個。
items.translation_en: Oh, that car for Permutation 5, that's the one Xing mentioned.
items.description: The speaker uses distinct Zhanjiang Cantonese tones and specific local particles.

items.title: 排列五《湛江奖门人》
items.transcript: 包括商家，徒弟由西到東都最棒，每晚九點半，到時聽到要獎就係依個嘞。
items.translation_en: Including businesses, the disciples from west to east are the best; every night at 9:30, that's when you'll hear the prize call.
items.description: The rapid cadence and the specific use of the final particle 'lak' are characteristic of regional Zhanjiang speech.

items.title: 排列五《湛江奖门人》
items.transcript: 冇事發財啦，十九之味呀，我都冇米水，又中呢一獎呀，嗰度五百萬等緊你係嘞。
items.translation_en: Wishing you wealth, the taste of nineteen, I have no money left, won another prize, five million is waiting for you there.
items.description: Includes regional slang like 'mi sui' for money and localized Cantonese phonology unique to the Zhanjiang area.

items.title: 长春市各地方言，你能听懂几个？
items.transcript: 都问我是哪里人，什么学历，我自我介绍一下啊，我自个儿。本人吉林省长春市农安县哈拉海镇农村人，方龄二十周岁，虚岁不到四十，从小玩土拉咔长大，祖上世代为农。
items.translation_en: Everyone asks where I'm from and my education level. Let me introduce myself. I'm a rural person from Halahai Town, Nong'an County, Changchun, Jilin. I'm 20 years old, but nominally nearly 40. I grew up playing with dirt clods, and my ancestors have been farmers for generations.
items.description: Uses Northeastern dialect terms like '自个儿' (oneself) and '土拉咔' (dirt clods).

items.title: 长春市各地方言，你能听懂几个？
items.transcript: 就因为德惠地区方言，这一早上这家里要麻过蹭的，我给你们唠下，咋个事啊。头两天吧，我没事上我妈那去溜达，然后我妈就给我倒过，这块不得劲，那块不得劲的。我说那咋整啊，我说要不那天啥吧，我说过两天我领你上医院去检查检查去。
items.translation_en: Because of the Dehui dialect, the house has been noisy all morning. Let me tell you what happened. A few days ago, I went to visit my mom, and she kept complaining to me that this part of her body felt unwell, and that part felt unwell. I said, what should we do? How about I take you to the hospital for a check-up in a few days?
items.description: Features rich local vocabulary like '要麻过蹭' (chaotic), '唠' (chat), '倒过' (grumble), '不得劲' (unwell), and '咋整' (how to handle).

items.title: 长春市各地方言，你能听懂几个？
items.transcript: 这家里火景隔外头瞪眼干不上，就那样子，那地儿帮我们改色，那杨家阿是隔那楞着。那老增娟着，你说这鸡啊那狗呆当月，不中，着井蹦得让它出流溜的。这小鸡在当月圈的，都不耐下蛋。
items.translation_en: This situation at home is frustrating... the chickens and dogs in the yard... it's no good... they need to be active. These chickens cooped up in the yard aren't good at laying eggs.
items.description: Contains very thick regional accent and local terms like '不中' (no good) and '出流溜' (moving fast/smoothly).

items.title: 长春市各地方言，你能听懂几个？
items.transcript: 这不嘛，这两天东北话火了，老多南方的小土豆来给我出难题，问我你们东北脑杠子是啥意思，我也点懵啊，没听过脑杠子呀。
items.translation_en: Well, the Northeast dialect has become popular lately. Many 'little potatoes' from the south came to challenge me, asking what 'naogangzi' means. I was a bit confused too; I've never heard of it.
items.description: Includes '小土豆' (a popular slang for tourists) and '脑杠子' (a dialect word for forehead).

items.title: 长春市各地方言，你能听懂几个？
items.transcript: 如何判断一个人是不是土生土长的长春人，你让他念这两个字，但凡念绿园的，那都不是，而真正的座地炮会念路园。
items.translation_en: How to tell if someone is a native of Changchun? Ask them to read these two characters. If they say 'Lǜyuán', they aren't. Real natives say 'Lùyuán'.
items.description: Explains a specific local pronunciation rule for 'Luyuan' and uses the dialect term '座地炮' (local native).

items.title: 江苏车牌歌(梅州M版)
items.transcript: 苏A南京车，苏B无锡个，苏C我们徐州的，那是真牛逼的
items.translation_en: Su A is Nanjing's car, Su B is Wuxi's, Su C is our Xuzhou's, that's really cool.
items.description: Uses the Meizhou Hakka possessive particle '个' (ke) and regional pronunciation for 'we/our' (nga-teu).

items.title: 江苏车牌歌(梅州M版)
items.transcript: 南通那个是大F，连云港是苏G，淮安是大H，苏J盐城车
items.translation_en: Nantong's is Su F, Lianyungang is Su G, Huai'an is Su H, Su J is Yancheng's car.
items.description: The cadence and specific vowel shifts in '车' (tsha) and '大' (thai) are characteristic of the Meizhou dialect.

items.title: 江苏车牌歌(梅州M版)
items.transcript: 镇江是苏L，泰州是苏M，最后一个是苏N
items.translation_en: Zhenjiang is Su L, Taizhou is Su M, the last one is Su N.
items.description: Includes distinct Hakka phonology in the naming of cities and license plate letters.

items.title: 挑战用南昌话在日本配眼镜｜第二集
items.transcript: 老板，今天眼睛杯，今天眼睛，今天可以出来吗？
items.translation_en: Boss, can the glasses be ready today?
items.description: Uses the specific Nanchang dialectal term '眼睛杯' (yan jing bei) for glasses and Nanchang phonology.

items.title: 挑战用南昌话在日本配眼镜｜第二集
items.transcript: 今天杯眼睛今天，今天可以出来吗？
items.translation_en: Can the glasses be ready today?
items.description: The speaker repeats the dialectal word for glasses with a distinct Nanchang accent.

items.title: 挑战用南昌话在日本配眼镜｜第二集
items.transcript: 这个北眼睛好像这个老南昌话，用的一点都不懂啊。
items.translation_en: This 'bei yanjing' sounds like old Nanchang dialect, they don't understand it at all.
items.description: The speaker explicitly mentions that '北眼睛' (glasses) is old Nanchang dialect and observes the lack of comprehension.

items.title: 新竹风情-客语
items.transcript: 有客庄个陂塘 陂塘水过耒
items.translation_en: There is a pond in the Hakka village, the water flows from the pond.
items.description: Includes the terms '客庄' (Hakka village) and '陂塘' (irrigation ponds), which are significant historical features of Hakka settlements in Taiwan.

items.title: 新竹风情-客语
items.transcript: 贡献个细妹 贡献细妹真阿答
items.translation_en: The dedicated girls, the dedicated girls are so clever.
items.description: Uses '细妹' (Hakka for girl) and the dialect-specific adjective '阿答' (skillful/clever), which are characteristic of the Hakka language.

items.title: 新竹风情-客语
items.transcript: 伯公个石壁 放等淡薄红
items.translation_en: The stone wall of the Earth God is tinged with a little red.
items.description: Refers to '伯公' (Bogong), the distinctive Hakka term for the Earth God (Tudi Gong), a central figure in Hakka folk religion.

items.title: 新竹风情-客语
items.transcript: 新竹个板条 年年过耒
items.translation_en: Hsinchu's flat rice noodles come year after year.
items.description: Explicitly mentions Hsinchu and its most famous local Hakka specialty food, '板条' (ban-tiao).

items.title: 新竹风情-客语
items.transcript: 大家个心肝 大家心肝心花开
items.translation_en: Everyone's heart, everyone's heart is blooming with joy.
items.description: Features the Hakka term '心肝' (heart/soul) and regional phonetics for '大家' and '心花开'.

items.title: “豉油辣椒酱”下一句是？广东45句粤语歇后语，句句有哲理
items.transcript: 老婆担伞
items.translation_en: A wife holding an umbrella
items.description: This is the first half of a Cantonese allegorical saying (Xiehouyu) leading to the pun '阴公' (pitiful).

items.title: “豉油辣椒酱”下一句是？广东45句粤语歇后语，句句有哲理
items.transcript: 豉油捞饭——整色整水
items.translation_en: Mixing rice with soy sauce - just for show
items.description: A traditional Cantonese idiom describing someone who makes things look good on the outside but lacks substance.

items.title: “豉油辣椒酱”下一句是？广东45句粤语歇后语，句句有哲理
items.transcript: 狗上瓦缸——有条路
items.translation_en: A dog on a tile vat - there's a path
items.description: A Cantonese saying used to imply that there is a secret way or a hidden scheme involved.

items.title: “豉油辣椒酱”下一句是？广东45句粤语歇后语，句句有哲理
items.transcript: 老鼠尾生疮——大晒有限
items.translation_en: A sore on a mouse's tail - its greatness is limited
items.description: A humorous Cantonese dialectal expression meaning someone's influence or the scale of an event is very small.

items.title: “豉油辣椒酱”下一句是？广东45句粤语歇后语，句句有哲理
items.transcript: 湿水马骝——越揼越紧
items.translation_en: A wet monkey - getting tighter and tighter
items.description: A Cantonese-specific metaphor used to describe a situation that becomes increasingly restrictive or difficult.

items.title: “没有锦州口音？这就是最标准的普通话！”
items.transcript: 请姚屋了巴肚的呗
items.translation_en: Please get some warm water, right?
items.description: Uses 'wulebadu' which is a highly specific Jinzhou dialectal way of describing lukewarm water.

items.title: “没有锦州口音？这就是最标准的普通话！”
items.transcript: 温嘚呼的
items.translation_en: Warm/Lukewarm.
items.description: A classic Jinzhou/Northeast Chinese adjective for water at a comfortable warm temperature.

items.title: “没有锦州口音？这就是最标准的普通话！”
items.transcript: 就搁这嘎德呢
items.translation_en: It's just right here.
items.description: Uses 'zhe gade' (here) with the heavy Jinzhou accent characteristic of the region's version of Northeastern Mandarin.

items.title: “没有锦州口音？这就是最标准的普通话！”
items.transcript: 听得了的
items.translation_en: I've heard you/Understood.
items.description: The suffix and intonation used for agreement are characteristic of the local dialect.

items.title: “没有锦州口音？这就是最标准的普通话！”
items.transcript: 八了事
items.translation_en: That's fine/Okay.
items.description: 'Baleshi' is a very distinct Jinzhou localism meaning 'alright' or 'finished'.

items.title: 广东佛山市地区方言，你能听懂几个？
items.transcript: 南海话是这么说，开车叫做哒拆，机车叫做摩托，摩的叫做哒哈路，骑机车的男人叫靓仔，骑机车的女人叫靓妹。
items.translation_en: This is how we speak in Nanhai: driving a car is called 'da cha', a motorcycle is 'mo tor', a motorcycle taxi is 'da ha lo', a man on a motorcycle is a 'handsome guy', and a woman is a 'pretty girl'.
items.description: The speaker explicitly defines localized vocabulary used in the Nanhai district, which differs significantly from standard Cantonese terms for transportation.

items.title: 广东佛山市地区方言，你能听懂几个？
items.transcript: 啊，问十几个亲戚借钱凑凑埋埋拎咗去畀个首期，月供就两千几。
items.translation_en: Ah, borrowing money from more than ten relatives to scrape together enough for the down payment, and the monthly mortgage is over two thousand.
items.description: Features the distinct Gaoming accent, characterized by unique tonal qualities and vowel pronunciations that are noticeably different from the Guangzhou or Chancheng standards.

items.title: 广东佛山市地区方言，你能听懂几个？
items.transcript: 你饮唔饮伊力包啊？一起去食臭皮醋。
items.translation_en: Do you want to drink Yilibao? Let's go eat stinky skin vinegar together.
items.description: Uses regional culinary references specific to the Sanshui area, such as 'Yilibao' (a local beverage) and 'Choupi Cu' (a local vinegar-based specialty).

items.title: 广东佛山市地区方言，你能听懂几个？
items.transcript: 你返山打山台咩？返左啦，返来都冇人吼。
items.translation_en: Are you going back to...? I'm back, but no one is paying attention to me anyway.
items.description: Demonstrates the Shunde accent and the use of '冇人吼', a local expression meaning to be ignored or to have no suitors.

items.title: 广东佛山市地区方言，你能听懂几个？
items.transcript: 我今年32岁啦，系禅城人。咁我搵对象呢，净系得几个要求啫。
items.translation_en: I'm 32 years old this year and I'm from Chancheng. I only have a few requirements for finding a partner.
items.description: Representing the Chancheng (central urban) dialect, which serves as the bridge between standard Cantonese and other Foshan sub-dialects.

items.title: 嘉兴话-没什么好说的
items.transcript: 唔呒啥好说个
items.translation_en: Nothing to say
items.description: Features the classic Wu Chinese negation '唔呒' (wú mǔ) and the local pronunciation of final particles common in the Jiaxing region.

items.title: 嘉兴话-没什么好说的
items.transcript: 我真唔呒啥好说个
items.translation_en: I really have nothing to say
items.description: Demonstrates a complete sentence using Jiaxing dialect grammar and phonetic characteristics.

items.title: 猜猜我这顿在三亚大东海的海鲜餐多少钱？#上海话 #上海方言 #沪语 #学说上海话 #上海人 #上海话教程 #老派上海话 #三亚吃海鲜#海鲜大餐#海南三亚海鲜
items.transcript: 阿里想内博多压方哦累吃呀喂，哥丹那索欲兹大东黑地区吃各呀子廖噶。
items.translation_en: Where do you think is a good place to eat seafood? Today, I'm here in the Dadonghai area to eat some seafood.
items.description: Uses characteristic Shanghainese terms like 'ali' for where and specific vowel shifts in words like 'seafood' and 'area'.

items.title: 猜猜我这顿在三亚大东海的海鲜餐多少钱？#上海话 #上海方言 #沪语 #学说上海话 #上海人 #上海话教程 #老派上海话 #三亚吃海鲜#海鲜大餐#海南三亚海鲜
items.transcript: 刚豆海西，弄模桑半宁嘎贼，徐死嘎才各火自幸噶位滴得弄嘎公。
items.translation_en: When it comes to seafood, you shouldn't buy from strangers; you should pick it yourself and find a reliable place to have it cooked.
items.description: Includes 'nong' for you and 'zi' for self, typical of the Shanghai dialect, along with specific phrasing for processing food.

items.title: 猜猜我这顿在三亚大东海的海鲜餐多少钱？#上海话 #上海方言 #沪语 #学说上海话 #上海人 #上海话教程 #老派上海话 #三亚吃海鲜#海鲜大餐#海南三亚海鲜
items.transcript: 我内累得麻，哎哟，婆婆婆，索嘎星自呗位滴。
items.translation_en: I came to buy it, oh my, wow, it's so fresh.
items.description: The speaker uses dialectal exclamations and the phrase 'so fresh' in a local accent.

items.title: 猜猜我这顿在三亚大东海的海鲜餐多少钱？#上海话 #上海方言 #沪语 #学说上海话 #上海人 #上海话教程 #老派上海话 #三亚吃海鲜#海鲜大餐#海南三亚海鲜
items.transcript: 喂一滴撒奔亲真真，心丝各辉白则则，呼个草草一，蔬菜啊总归要则各。
items.translation_en: The abalone is steamed, the shrimp is white and tender, stir-fried crab, and you always need some vegetables.
items.description: Uses triplet adjectives like 'bai ze ze' (white and clean) and 'qin zhen zhen' which are very common in Wu dialects.

items.title: 猜猜我这顿在三亚大东海的海鲜餐多少钱？#上海话 #上海方言 #沪语 #学说上海话 #上海人 #上海话教程 #老派上海话 #三亚吃海鲜#海鲜大餐#海南三亚海鲜
items.transcript: 那嘎能娘您跨洛，跨洛了，弄饿精神向，就似美好了。
items.translation_en: Everyone be happy; if you're happy, your spirit will be good.
items.description: Uses 'nong' (your) and the specific cadence of a Shanghainese blessing/closing remark.

items.title: 肖宇梁·天水话&天津话线上版《德龄与慈禧》
items.transcript: 跟我在长, 腰进的四念进和二朵
items.translation_en: Follow me, the important things are the eyes and the ears.
items.description: Uses specific Tianshui dialect pronunciation for 'eyes' (nian jin) and 'ears' (er duo) with distinct regional tones.

items.title: 肖宇梁·天水话&天津话线上版《德龄与慈禧》
items.transcript: 啥该看错, 啥不该看错, 啥该听说, 啥不该听说
items.translation_en: What should be seen, what shouldn't be seen, what should be heard, what shouldn't be heard.
items.description: Uses the dialectal 'sha' instead of 'shenme' and distinct Gansu-region tonal patterns.

items.title: 肖宇梁·天水话&天津话线上版《德龄与慈禧》
items.transcript: 咋没看见当看见, 咋看见了当没看见
items.translation_en: How to treat not seeing it as seeing it, and how to treat seeing it as not seeing it.
items.description: Features the Tianshui dialect's usage of 'za' (how) and specific vowel shifts.

items.title: 肖宇梁·天水话&天津话线上版《德龄与慈禧》
items.transcript: 抓这个分寸照好了, 你就能当辅佐官了
items.translation_en: If you handle this measure well, you can become an assistant official.
items.description: The pronunciation of 'fencun' and 'guan' reflects the local accent of Tianshui, Gansu.

items.title: 肖宇梁·天水话&天津话线上版《德龄与慈禧》
items.transcript: 您看看鹿史簿, 只有进去的时儿, 没有出来的
items.translation_en: Look at the record books; there's only a time for entering, not for leaving.
items.description: Heavy regional accent with specific rhoticity and tonal qualities unique to the Northwest dialects.

items.title: 屏幕前的佛山人，你地系咪甘？
items.transcript: 你地系咪咁？
items.translation_en: Are you guys like this?
items.description: Uses the Cantonese sentence structure '系咪' for questions and the particle '咁' (like this).

items.title: 屏幕前的佛山人，你地系咪甘？
items.transcript: 咩啊
items.translation_en: What?
items.description: Uses '咩', a standard Cantonese/Foshan contraction for 'what'.

items.title: 屏幕前的佛山人，你地系咪甘？
items.transcript: 咩啫
items.translation_en: So what? / What now?
items.description: Combines the interrogative '咩' with the unique Cantonese final particle '啫' to add a specific tone of annoyance or dismissiveness.

items.title: 屏幕前的佛山人，你地系咪甘？
items.transcript: 咩話
items.translation_en: What did you say?
items.description: A classic Cantonese expression used to express surprise or to ask someone to repeat themselves.

items.title: 屏幕前的佛山人，你地系咪甘？
items.transcript: 系咁系咁
items.translation_en: That's it, that's it / Okay, okay.
items.description: A common Cantonese colloquialism used as a filler or to quickly end a conversation/agree casually.

items.title: 20251119郑州大剧院河南方言话剧《老家》
items.transcript: 我们这两场是新潮的话，我们这两场是纯河南话剧。
items.translation_en: These two shows of ours are trendy; these two shows are pure Henan dialect plays.
items.description: The speaker explicitly identifies the performance as a 'pure Henan dialect play' using the regional accent and 'He'nan' pronunciation markers.

items.title: 20251119郑州大剧院河南方言话剧《老家》
items.transcript: 老家是什么？老家是中国人中原人的心灵故乡。
items.translation_en: What is 'Lao Jia' (Hometown)? 'Lao Jia' is the spiritual hometown of Chinese people, the people of the Central Plains.
items.description: The use of the term 'Zhongyuanren' (Central Plains people) and the specific tonal inflections on 'Lao Jia' are characteristic of the regional dialect and identity.

items.title: 20251119郑州大剧院河南方言话剧《老家》
items.transcript: 我们的方言，我们的曲艺，一刻都没有改变过。我们是忠诚的中原文化的传播者，把我们伟大的传统文化，河南文化，发扬光大！
items.translation_en: Our dialect, our folk arts, haven't changed for a single moment. We are loyal spreaders of the Central Plains culture, carrying forward our great traditional culture, the Henan culture!
items.description: The passionate delivery features strong Henan-specific retroflex consonants and sentence-final particles typical of Zhengzhou and surrounding areas.

items.title: 上海话vs绍兴话 2
items.transcript: Dhou-vu
items.translation_en: Tofu
items.description: The speakers demonstrate the specific Wu dialect pronunciation of tofu, characterized by softened consonants and specific vowel rounding.

items.title: 上海话vs绍兴话 2
items.transcript: 贼好勒
items.translation_en: Extremely good / delicious
items.description: A characteristic Shaoxing dialect superlative used to describe food that is exceptionally tasty.

items.title: 上海话vs绍兴话 2
items.transcript: 比到老嘚啦
items.translation_en: Incredibly delicious
items.description: The Shanghai dialect equivalent for the Shaoxing superlative, using local grammar and tone.

items.title: 上海话vs绍兴话 2
items.transcript: 糯嫩啊
items.translation_en: Soft and tender
items.description: The speaker uses Shaoxing-specific phonetic shifts for 'nuò' (sticky/soft) and 'nèn' (tender).

items.title: 上海话vs绍兴话 2
items.transcript: 羊臊气
items.translation_en: The gamey smell of lamb
items.description: Pronounced with a distinct local accent (Sāo Qì), this is a common dialectal term for the specific odor of certain meats.

items.title: 洛阳7区7县方言测试，能听懂几个
items.transcript: 有个孩子，叫老多，娶了个媳妇，叫兴合。那一天，去他家，碰见了他爹、他妈、他大伯。
items.translation_en: There was a kid named Laoduo who married a wife named Xinghe. One day, I went to his house and met his father, mother, and uncle.
items.description: Uses classic Luoyang intonation and the verb 'jiao' (to be named) in a rhythmic local style characteristic of the Old City district.

items.title: 洛阳7区7县方言测试，能听懂几个
items.transcript: 干那嘞，喝汤吧？弄啥嘞，喝汤吧？有空没，喝汤吧？
items.translation_en: What are you doing? Let's go have soup. What's up? Let's go have soup. Got time? Let's go have soup.
items.description: Features 'he tang' (drinking soup), a culturally significant phrase in Luoyang that refers to eating dinner, alongside the local particle 'le'.

items.title: 洛阳7区7县方言测试，能听懂几个
items.transcript: 在俺偃师话中有一种闲在，叫阵儿弯；有一种刚才，叫才将儿；有一种早上，叫强且。
items.translation_en: In our Yanshi dialect, there is a kind of leisure called 'zher ner war'; a kind of 'just now' called 'cai jiang er'; and a kind of morning called 'qiang qie'.
items.description: Directly lists specific local vocabulary replacements (zher ner war, cai jiang er, qiang qie) that differ significantly from Standard Mandarin.

items.title: 洛阳7区7县方言测试，能听懂几个
items.transcript: 哎呀，看你那芝麻叉衣，穿得这一身衣裳，赶紧下去洗个澡去吧。
items.translation_en: Oh my, look at those dirty, mottled clothes you are wearing. Hurry up and go take a bath.
items.description: Uses the very specific dialectal term 'zhima chayi' to describe clothes that are dirty or have a messy pattern.

items.title: 洛阳7区7县方言测试，能听懂几个
items.transcript: 老天爷啊，看着天，出着日头下着雨，咿，这真是悬都都哎呀。
items.translation_en: Goodness gracious, look at the sky, it's raining while the sun is out, oh, this is truly strange.
items.description: Features the unique exclamation 'yi' and the dialect term 'xuandudu' which signifies something strange or unsettling in Yichuan County speech.

items.title: 肖战“社死式扶车”火上热搜！锦州片场好心扶共享单车，一伸手直接让整排车集体躺平，当场懵圈石化+东北方言暴击，还硬着头皮扶完所有车，这波“笨蛋美人式善良”直接戳中
items.transcript: 哎呀妈呀
items.translation_en: Oh my goodness!
items.description: This is a classic and very recognizable Northeast regional exclamation used to express sudden shock or disbelief.

items.title: 肖战“社死式扶车”火上热搜！锦州片场好心扶共享单车，一伸手直接让整排车集体躺平，当场懵圈石化+东北方言暴击，还硬着头皮扶完所有车，这波“笨蛋美人式善良”直接戳中
items.transcript: 昨天我还看见战哥在咱这儿扶车呢，真，人可帅了。
items.translation_en: I saw Brother Zhan helping with bikes here yesterday, truly, he's so handsome.
items.description: The speaker uses local Jinzhou/Northeast pronunciation and colloquial phrasing like '咱这儿' (our place/here).

items.title: 肖战“社死式扶车”火上热搜！锦州片场好心扶共享单车，一伸手直接让整排车集体躺平，当场懵圈石化+东北方言暴击，还硬着头皮扶完所有车，这波“笨蛋美人式善良”直接戳中
items.transcript: 秃噜皮，赶叹儿，这些土话...
items.translation_en: Scraped skin, coincidence/bad timing, these local slang words...
items.description: Features specific Northeast vocabulary ('秃噜皮' and '赶叹儿') that is characteristic of the regional dialect.

items.title: 肖战“社死式扶车”火上热搜！锦州片场好心扶共享单车，一伸手直接让整排车集体躺平，当场懵圈石化+东北方言暴击，还硬着头皮扶完所有车，这波“笨蛋美人式善良”直接戳中
items.transcript: 一句带着浓郁东北大茬子味的哎呀妈呀脱口而出
items.translation_en: A blurted out 'Aiya Maya' with a strong 'big-slag' (heavy) Northeast flavor.
items.description: The narrator explicitly identifies the speech as having the 'big slag' (大茬子) flavor, which is a common metaphor for a thick Northeast accent.

items.title: 中国最难懂青海方言，西宁话比四川话还好听，玉树藏语压根听不懂
items.transcript: 曾经有一份真诚的爱情摆在我面前，我没有珍惜... (Xining Dialect)
items.translation_en: There was once a sincere love before me, but I didn't cherish it...
items.description: Features Xining dialect's characteristic phonetic shifts and the use of 'no' or 'niao' for 'I' instead of the standard Mandarin 'wo'.

items.title: 中国最难懂青海方言，西宁话比四川话还好听，玉树藏语压根听不懂
items.transcript: 扎西德勒... (Tibetan Lyrics)
items.translation_en: Tashi Delek (A Tibetan greeting)...
items.description: Demonstrates the Yushu Tibetan dialect, which is linguistically distinct from the local Mandarin-based Xining dialect.

items.title: 中国最难懂青海方言，西宁话比四川话还好听，玉树藏语压根听不懂
items.transcript: 尕妹子大门上，你浪上来...
items.translation_en: Little sister, come out to the front gate...
items.description: A traditional 'Hua'er' folk song using Qinghai rural dialect, featuring regional vocabulary like '尕' (ga) and specific melodic intonation.

items.title: 中国最难懂青海方言，西宁话比四川话还好听，玉树藏语压根听不懂
items.transcript: 哎，几条达拉，这大人的面子给得不够大吗？你回话里...
items.translation_en: Hey, guys, isn't this elder's face big enough? Answer me...
items.description: Rich in Xining-specific slang and colloquialisms, such as '达拉' referring to people or guys.

items.title: 中国最难懂青海方言，西宁话比四川话还好听，玉树藏语压根听不懂
items.transcript: 怹爱你
items.translation_en: I love you.
items.description: Uses the unique Xining dialect first-person pronoun '怹' (pronounced similarly to 'nan'), which replaces the standard 'wo' in regional speech.

items.title: “廿卅卌”事关男人的闽南俗语“上卌袂摄”#闽南语实验室 #解锁闽南方言 #闽南乡音传播计划 #闽南的青年 厦漳泉台·十里不同音#闽南俗语 #老中青
items.transcript: 卌袂摄，啊这个卌袂摄，到底是什么意思呢？
items.translation_en: Reaching forty and losing vigor, so what does 'sap bē liap' actually mean?
items.description: Uses the specific Hokkien contraction '卌' (sap) for forty and the colloquial term '袂摄' (bē liap).

items.title: “廿卅卌”事关男人的闽南俗语“上卌袂摄”#闽南语实验室 #解锁闽南方言 #闽南乡音传播计划 #闽南的青年 厦漳泉台·十里不同音#闽南俗语 #老中青
items.transcript: 囡仔放尿泉过溪，老人放尿滴著鞋。
items.translation_en: Children pee like a spring across the stream; old men pee, and it drips on their shoes.
items.description: A classic Southern Min rhyming proverb using dialectal vocabulary like '囡仔' (children) and '放尿' (urinate).

items.title: “廿卅卌”事关男人的闽南俗语“上卌袂摄”#闽南语实验室 #解锁闽南方言 #闽南乡音传播计划 #闽南的青年 厦漳泉台·十里不同音#闽南俗语 #老中青
items.transcript: 卅几岁，那你也可以叫卅几岁。
items.translation_en: Thirty-something years old, you can also call it 'sa-kui-he'.
items.description: Demonstrates the contraction '卅' (sa) for thirty, distinct from standard Mandarin pronunciation.

items.title: “廿卅卌”事关男人的闽南俗语“上卌袂摄”#闽南语实验室 #解锁闽南方言 #闽南乡音传播计划 #闽南的青年 厦漳泉台·十里不同音#闽南俗语 #老中青
items.transcript: 廿外岁，那也可以叫廿几岁。
items.translation_en: Twenty-plus years old, and it can also be called 'jiap-tuā-he'.
items.description: Demonstrates the contraction '廿' (jiap/niap) for twenty used in Hokkien speech.

items.title: #沧州马姐保险服务#泊头同城 #泊头方言#安盛#安盛卓越馨选医疗保险
items.transcript: 零门槛，零门槛，零门槛，再说一遍，咱这个百万医疗是零门槛的。
items.translation_en: Zero deductible, zero deductible, zero deductible, let me say it again, our 'million-yuan medical' insurance has zero deductible.
items.description: The use of '咱' (zán) and the heavy intonation of the Cangzhou/Botou accent are evident in the opening catchphrase.

items.title: #沧州马姐保险服务#泊头同城 #泊头方言#安盛#安盛卓越馨选医疗保险
items.transcript: 你这小嘴一上来嘚儿吧嘚儿吧就这么说根本就没有。
items.translation_en: You just started chattering away with that mouth of yours saying it doesn't exist at all.
items.description: Uses the vivid Northern/Hebei dialect phrase '嘚儿吧嘚儿吧' (dē ba dē ba) to describe excessive talking.

items.title: #沧州马姐保险服务#泊头同城 #泊头方言#安盛#安盛卓越馨选医疗保险
items.transcript: 我看你那小嘴儿是肉长的，要是瓷的就给你砸开咧。
items.translation_en: I see your mouth is made of flesh; if it were made of porcelain, I would smash it open.
items.description: Includes a very specific regional colloquial threat/metaphor with the local final particle '咧' (lie).

items.title: 老舍到济南，挑马车
items.transcript: 到济南来，借是头一遭，即出车站，汗流如浹。
items.translation_en: Coming to Jinan, this is the first time; as soon as I stepped out of the station, I was drenched in sweat.
items.description: The use of '借' (jiè) instead of '这' (zhè) for 'this' is a characteristic pronunciation in the Jinan/Shandong region.

items.title: 老舍到济南，挑马车
items.transcript: 行！他生气十足瞪我一眼，行！从济南走德国都行！
items.translation_en: Fine! He gave me a furious glare and said, 'Fine! We could go from Jinan to Germany if you want!'
items.description: The blunt, emphatic use of '行' (fine/okay) and the hyperbolic reference to 'Germany' reflect local conversational style and humor.

items.title: 老舍到济南，挑马车
items.transcript: 可是再也不知，济南太阳光，为嘛这么特别。
items.translation_en: But I just can't figure out why the sunlight in Jinan is so special.
items.description: The term '为嘛' (wèi má) for 'why' is a very common dialectal marker in Northern and Shandong dialects.

items.title: 老舍到济南，挑马车
items.transcript: 买点儿小山楂放也治好了。或者坐，急跑了。
items.translation_en: Buying some small hawthorns would have fixed it. Or if you sit [in the carriage], [the sweat] runs off quickly.
items.description: The sentence structure and the specific use of '急跑' (run quickly/off) in this context have a strong local flavor.

items.title: 老舍到济南，挑马车
items.transcript: 我也没争气，相反我还挺感谢他，热心肠。
items.translation_en: I didn't argue; on the contrary, I was quite grateful for his warmheartedness.
items.description: The phrasing '也没争气' used in this narrative sense, along with the intonation, is typical of regional storytelling.

items.title: 南昌崽哩子来沈阳大街段子必须热门
items.transcript: 你是什么勾巴，你是什么勾巴
items.translation_en: What the hell are you, what the hell are you?
items.description: The term '勾巴' (Gouba) is a highly specific, vulgar slang term common in Northeastern dialect internet culture as a general insult.

items.title: 南昌崽哩子来沈阳大街段子必须热门
items.transcript: 你给我往后稍一稍，等会儿
items.translation_en: You step back for me, wait a moment.
items.description: '稍一稍' (shao yi shao) is a colloquial Northern/Northeastern expression meaning to move or step aside.

items.title: 南昌崽哩子来沈阳大街段子必须热门
items.transcript: 你在沈阳这一块，我指定不惯着你
items.translation_en: In this area of Shenyang, I definitely won't go easy on you.
items.description: '指定' (zhiding) used as 'definitely' and '不惯着' (bu guanzhe) meaning 'won't tolerate/spoil' are signature Dongbei idioms.

items.title: “内蒙话”听起来什么样？【阿拉善 巴彦淖尔 鄂尔多斯 包头 呼和浩特 锡林郭勒 赤峰 通辽 兴安 呼伦贝尔】
items.transcript: 灶马爷到腊月二十三就玉皇大帝那儿汇报工作去，玉皇大帝给佛家……
items.translation_en: The Kitchen God goes to the Jade Emperor to report on work on the 23rd day of the 12th lunar month, and the Jade Emperor tells the Buddha...
items.description: Uses specific folk terminology like 'Zao Ma Ye' (Kitchen God) and features the distinct Northern retroflex and tonal patterns of Inner Mongolian Mandarin.

items.title: “内蒙话”听起来什么样？【阿拉善 巴彦淖尔 鄂尔多斯 包头 呼和浩特 锡林郭勒 赤峰 通辽 兴安 呼伦贝尔】
items.transcript: 小男孩儿和小女孩儿他俩有百分之八九十自搞的，自搞成了以后呢，他需要一个中间人。
items.translation_en: Eighty to ninety percent of young boys and girls find each other on their own; after they succeed in doing so, they need a middleman.
items.description: Uses 'Zi Gao' (self-finding/self-matching), a colloquial regionalism for dating without an initial matchmaker, spoken with a strong local accent.

items.title: “内蒙话”听起来什么样？【阿拉善 巴彦淖尔 鄂尔多斯 包头 呼和浩特 锡林郭勒 赤峰 通辽 兴安 呼伦贝尔】
items.transcript: 用那个犁杖还待套上尖牛，还待有伏犁杖的，还待有垫嘴的。
items.translation_en: Using that plow required hitching up the oxen, and you needed someone to hold the plow and someone to guide them.
items.description: Contains rural agricultural terminology like 'Li Zhang' (plow) and 'Jian Niu' (oxen), typical of Northern/Inner Mongolian farming dialects.

items.title: “内蒙话”听起来什么样？【阿拉善 巴彦淖尔 鄂尔多斯 包头 呼和浩特 锡林郭勒 赤峰 通辽 兴安 呼伦贝尔】
items.transcript: 玩游戏呢，我就是藏猫猫，一个人猫，几个人找。
items.translation_en: As for playing games, I played hide-and-seek; one person hides, and several people look.
items.description: The term 'Cang Mao Mao' for hide-and-seek is a classic Northern/Dongbei regionalism frequently used in Inner Mongolia.

items.title: “内蒙话”听起来什么样？【阿拉善 巴彦淖尔 鄂尔多斯 包头 呼和浩特 锡林郭勒 赤峰 通辽 兴安 呼伦贝尔】
items.transcript: 到奶站后，师傅跟我说，小伙儿，这就是你下一步工作的地方。
items.translation_en: After arriving at the milk station, the master said to me: Young man, this is the place where you will work next.
items.description: The pronunciation of 'Nai Zhan' and the rhythmic cadence of the speech are characteristic of the Hulunbuir region's blend of Mandarin and local accent.

items.title: 莆田话过年应对亲戚#莆仙方言教学#已读乱回#搞笑#过年#雅美佳黑咪
items.transcript: 阿弟呀，乜相唔不舍归来，啥不来个后
items.translation_en: Hey brother, why are you back so late? How are things going?
items.description: Uses the distinct '乜相' (how/why) and sentence structure typical of Puxian Min.

items.title: 莆田话过年应对亲戚#莆仙方言教学#已读乱回#搞笑#过年#雅美佳黑咪
items.transcript: 我也况不个后呢，吊金的酒个等喔
items.translation_en: I'm not doing very well either, just barely scraping by.
items.description: Features unique Puxian vocabulary like '况不个后' (not doing well) and specific modal particles.

items.title: 莆田话过年应对亲戚#莆仙方言教学#已读乱回#搞笑#过年#雅美佳黑咪
items.transcript: 刚在使钱呐，刚在使蛮不
items.translation_en: Just spent money, just spent a huge amount.
items.description: The pronunciation of '使钱' (spending money) and '蛮不' (a lot) follows Putian dialect phonology.

items.title: 莆田话过年应对亲戚#莆仙方言教学#已读乱回#搞笑#过年#雅美佳黑咪
items.transcript: 我也况不个后啊，吊金的扎个后
items.translation_en: I'm not doing well either, just barely making it.
items.description: Repetition of dialectal expressions for struggling/surviving that are specific to the region.

items.title: 莆田话过年应对亲戚#莆仙方言教学#已读乱回#搞笑#过年#雅美佳黑咪
items.transcript: 谁不时嘞回老，省农案
items.translation_en: When are you coming back? I'll see.
items.description: Demonstrates the 'random reply' technique using Puxian-specific temporal words and pronouns.

items.title: 徐州5区3县2市方言测试，能听懂几个
items.transcript: 勺小男孩，弄刺呢。勺小女孩，嗯，小女孩有点嘚色。
items.translation_en: Little boy, messing around. Little girl, well, the little girl is a bit of a show-off.
items.description: Uses Xuzhou-specific terms like '勺小' (shao xiao) for little/young and '弄刺' (nong ci) for teasing or messing around.

items.title: 徐州5区3县2市方言测试，能听懂几个
items.transcript: 恁怎么开的这车，为恁家开的不像。也不认得驾照恁怎么拿的。
items.translation_en: How are you driving this car? It doesn't look like your family's driving. I don't know how you even got your license.
items.description: Features the Jiawang regional accent and the use of '恁' (nen) for 'you', common in northern Jiangsu and Zhongyuan Mandarin.

items.title: 徐州5区3县2市方言测试，能听懂几个
items.transcript: 四是四，十是十，十四是十四，四十是四十。
items.translation_en: Four is four, ten is ten, fourteen is fourteen, forty is forty.
items.description: A tongue twister used to demonstrate the specific phonetic clarity and rhythmic patterns of the Feng County dialect.

items.title: 徐州5区3县2市方言测试，能听懂几个
items.transcript: 干嘛晃子来？你还欻吗？你望你不理他，你往哪去你。
items.translation_en: What are you doing? Are you still [doing that]? Look at you ignoring him, where are you going?
items.description: Uses '干嘛晃子' (gan ma huang zi), a very specific Suining dialect expression for 'what are you doing'.

items.title: 徐州5区3县2市方言测试，能听懂几个
items.transcript: 刚才买苹果，老板娘说五块钱一斤，我说你再贱点。
items.translation_en: Just now I was buying apples; the lady said five yuan a catty, and I said make it a bit cheaper.
items.description: Demonstrates the Pizhou dialect usage of '贱' (jian) to mean 'cheap/low-priced', which differs from its standard Mandarin derogatory meaning.

items.title: 正在向岁战前挑衅的二哥【长沙话配音】（ooc致歉）
items.transcript: 耶，岁巯哒，抵个都放在屋里港么子鬼哆啊。
items.translation_en: Yeah, Suibing, what on earth are you talking about at home?
items.description: Uses 'wuli' (home/at home) and 'gang mo zi gui' (what the hell are you saying), which are classic Changsha colloquialisms.

items.title: 正在向岁战前挑衅的二哥【长沙话配音】（ooc致歉）
items.transcript: 吓得吧，庚辰秋，我跟莫得粉手会打度屋里的家伙。
items.translation_en: Scared, aren't you, Shengqiu? I haven't even broken up with that guy at home yet.
items.description: Includes 'mo de' (don't have/not) and specific Changsha intonation on the final particles.

items.title: 正在向岁战前挑衅的二哥【长沙话配音】（ooc致歉）
items.transcript: 现在变哒岁巯，吓着大拉你人头咯。也方便你核得得嘞，你看你切跟个耍吧一样。
items.translation_en: Now Suibing has changed, scaring the wits out of people. It's convenient for you to stay here, look at you, you look like a clown.
items.description: Uses 'shua ba' to mean a clown or someone making a fool of themselves, a very localized term.

items.title: 秦皇岛4区3县方言测试，能听懂几个
items.transcript: 更别说，我说你，这牙齿长得真嫩呢，那我是夸你呢，你都一个劲儿嘛呢你。
items.translation_en: Not to mention, I tell you, these teeth look really good (tender), I'm praising you, but what on earth are you doing?
items.description: Uses the local term '嫩' (nèn) to mean pretty or good-looking and the phrase '嘛呢' (má ne) typical of Northern dialects.

items.title: 秦皇岛4区3县方言测试，能听懂几个
items.transcript: 等我哪天把账还完了，有条件了，我高低整双大皮鞋，带高跟的。走到我得嘚嘚嘚嘚的。完了再来瓶大锅子，喝着滋滋的。
items.translation_en: When I finish paying my debts and have the means, I'll definitely get a pair of big leather shoes, high-heeled ones. I'll walk with a 'clack-clack' sound. Then I'll have a bottle of 'Daguoge' soda, drinking it with a refreshing sizzle.
items.description: Includes local slang like '高低' (definitely) and '大锅子' (a specific local brand of soda/beverage), along with distinct onomatopoeia.

items.title: 秦皇岛4区3县方言测试，能听懂几个
items.transcript: 我问咱们秦皇岛的特色是什么？有的说特色是凉皮儿，大锅子。还有的说呢，男人特色，女人特色。
items.translation_en: I asked what the specialties of our Qinhuangdao are? Some said it's cold noodles and 'Daguoge' soda. Others said it's the character of the men and women here.
items.description: The speaker uses a heavy local accent and references '大锅子', a cultural staple of the Qinhuangdao area.

items.title: 秦皇岛4区3县方言测试，能听懂几个
items.transcript: 你也是还有三分土性呢，你这一天远的大花蟹的，现在就算你光定锥儿里底，我但凡眼皮儿得嗖一下子，都算我耍流氓。
items.translation_en: You still have some temper in you. You're out here with those big crabs every day; even if you were standing there naked now, if I even blinked an eye, you could call me a rogue.
items.description: Features dense local idiomatic language like '三分土性' (a bit of temper) and '光定锥儿' (a local slang term related to being naked or bare).

items.title: 秦皇岛4区3县方言测试，能听懂几个
items.transcript: 每个地方它都有方言... 晚上它不叫晚上，叫黑家。中午它也不叫中午，叫晌火。舅妈不叫舅妈，叫妗子。
items.translation_en: Every place has its own dialect... evening isn't called 'wanshang', it's 'heijia'. Noon isn't 'zhongwu', it's 'shanghuo'. Aunt isn't 'jiuma', it's 'jinzi'.
items.description: The speaker explicitly lists dialectal lexical substitutions common in the Lulong area, such as '黑家' for evening and '晌火' for noon.

items.title: 耍阔子(系列(三):制造机会亮金牙、手表、皮鞋。#荔浦话词典 #桂林阔子 #耍阔子 #学洋
items.transcript: 今天呢我来讲这个桂林阔子的古仔
items.translation_en: Today I'm going to tell a story about a Guilin show-off.
items.description: Uses the dialect terms 'Kuozi' (show-off) and 'Guzai' (story/tale).

items.title: 耍阔子(系列(三):制造机会亮金牙、手表、皮鞋。#荔浦话词典 #桂林阔子 #耍阔子 #学洋
items.transcript: 你看我脑壳压进吗你啦
items.translation_en: Look at my head, did it hit you?
items.description: Uses 'Naoke' for head and a specific local sentence structure and tone common in Southwestern Mandarin dialects.

items.title: 耍阔子(系列(三):制造机会亮金牙、手表、皮鞋。#荔浦话词典 #桂林阔子 #耍阔子 #学洋
items.transcript: 莫你赏打颊
items.translation_en: Don't you try to start a fight.
items.description: Includes the local negative imperative 'Mo' and 'Dajia' (slapping/fighting) specific to the Guilin area.

items.title: 耍阔子(系列(三):制造机会亮金牙、手表、皮鞋。#荔浦话词典 #桂林阔子 #耍阔子 #学洋
items.transcript: 双方面来我往的争呐争呐
items.translation_en: Both sides were arguing back and forth.
items.description: The repetitive phrasing 'Zheng na zheng na' and the intonation reflect the rhythmic nature of Lipu speech.

items.title: 耍阔子(系列(三):制造机会亮金牙、手表、皮鞋。#荔浦话词典 #桂林阔子 #耍阔子 #学洋
items.transcript: 我打嘎过碰到你啊
items.translation_en: I just happened to bump into you.
items.description: The usage of 'Daguo' as an adverbial particle is distinctive to the regional dialect.

items.title: 福州人过年一定要小心的事情！
items.transcript: 喂！2月15日至3月3日春节期间，福州地铁公交限时免费，欲知后事如何，且看虎纠好故事。
items.translation_en: Hey! During the Spring Festival from February 15th to March 3rd, Fuzhou's metro and buses are free for a limited time. To see what happens next, watch Fuzhou Good Stories.
items.description: The segment uses '虎纠' (Hujiu), which is a popular phonetic transliteration of the city's name 'Fuzhou' as pronounced in the Fuzhou dialect, often used to signal local identity in Mandarin speech.

items.title: 会说唐山话的键帽
items.transcript: 我该怎么办？今儿这牌打得也忒好咧！
items.translation_en: What should I do? These cards were played exceptionally well today!
items.description: Uses the characteristically Tangshan pronunciation of '忒' (tui) instead of the standard 'tè', and the local sentence-final particle '咧'.

items.title: 会说唐山话的键帽
items.transcript: 今儿这牌打得也忒好咧！
items.translation_en: These cards were played exceptionally well today!
items.description: A repetition of the previous phrase showing the distinct rising intonation and 'tui' pronunciation common in the Hebei Tangshan region.

items.title: 高雄两妇女闽南语吵架
items.transcript: Kì-ka hiah-kài! Kì-ka hiah-kài!
items.translation_en: This is so outrageous! This is so unreasonable!
items.description: Uses the dialect-specific adverbial phrase 'hiah-kài' to express extreme frustration or a high degree of something.

items.title: 高雄两妇女闽南语吵架
items.transcript: Kàn-ni-niâu! Kàn-cha̍p-peh-tāi! Á-nó?
items.translation_en: F*** your mother! F*** eighteen generations! What now?
items.description: Features traditional Hokkien profanity and the 'Á-nó' (what/how) interrogative typical of the dialect.

items.title: 高雄两妇女闽南语吵架
items.transcript: Áu-chhù-pī! Áu-chhù-pī!
items.translation_en: Neighbor! Neighbor!
items.description: Uses 'Áu-chhù-pī', which is the unique Southern Min term for neighbor, distinct from Mandarin 'línjū'.

items.title: 高雄两妇女闽南语吵架
items.transcript: Guá to m̄-sī sè-siáu thêng lín-tau!
items.translation_en: I'm not crazy enough to park at your house!
items.description: Includes 'sè-siáu' (dialectal slang for crazy/insane) and 'lín-tau' (meaning your home/family).

items.title: 莆田方言童谣
items.transcript: 风宁哇真真来个吹林喽
items.translation_en: The wind is truly blowing the pine trees.
items.description: Uses the distinctive Putianese nasal sounds and sentence structure typical of Puxian Min folk rhymes.

items.title: 莆田方言童谣
items.transcript: 吴宁叫吴宁宁, 白宁叫白内内, 深宁叫深哥哥
items.translation_en: Wu-ning is called Wu-ning-ning, White-ning is called White-nei-nei, Shen-ning is called Shen-ge-ge.
items.description: Features the '-ning' rhythmic suffix and specific tone sandhi characteristics of the Putian dialect.

items.title: 莆田方言童谣
items.transcript: 定宁叫定皮皮, 扣宁叫扣哒哒
items.translation_en: Ding-ning is called Ding-pi-pi, Kou-ning is called Kou-da-da.
items.description: Demonstrates local wordplay and onomatopoeic adjectives specific to the regional speech.

items.title: 莆田方言童谣
items.transcript: 赞宁叫赞布布, 乖宁叫乖弟弟
items.translation_en: Zan-ning is called Zan-bu-bu, Guai-ning is called Guai-di-di.
items.description: Illustrates the preservation of archaic or unique regional pronunciation for characters like 'Zan' and 'Guai'.

items.title: 福州话介绍祭灶年糖年糕展示
items.transcript: 五九奶祭灶殿祭
items.translation_en: Coming to the Stove God festival ceremony
items.description: The speaker uses Fuzhou dialect phonetics for 'Jizao' and general introductory phrasing typical of the Min Dong language group.

items.title: 福州话介绍祭灶年糖年糕展示
items.transcript: 红梨, 红火, 甜密
items.translation_en: Red pear, Red fire, Sweet honey (local snack names)
items.description: The pronunciation of 'Hong' and 'Tian' follows Fuzhou dialectal tones and vowel shifts.

items.title: 福州话介绍祭灶年糖年糕展示
items.transcript: 米莱包, 灶妈泥
items.translation_en: Rice bags, Kitchen God's Wife (local snacks)
items.description: Uses specific local terms for traditional Fuzhou candies with characteristic dialectal pronunciation.

items.title: 福州话介绍祭灶年糖年糕展示
items.transcript: 老幼圆, 叮当脑
items.translation_en: Old and young circles, Jingling brains (local snack names)
items.description: The vocabulary consists of traditional Fuzhou nicknames for sweets, spoken with a heavy regional accent.

items.title: 福州话介绍祭灶年糖年糕展示
items.transcript: 白仙糕, 纸盆选, 生半装
items.translation_en: White fairy cake, paper basin selection, raw half-pack
items.description: The final listing of cakes and packaging terms uses distinct Min Dong glottal endings and tonal contours.

items.title: 曹操“喊话”来不来长治？回答我！
items.transcript: 你说，长治们怎么忒地？
items.translation_en: Tell me, why is Changzhi so great?
items.description: The use of '忒地' (tè de) as an intensifier for 'great' or 'special' is a characteristic of the local dialect in Shanxi.

items.title: 曹操“喊话”来不来长治？回答我！
items.transcript: 硬撑烫浓香甜的猪汤喝过呢？
items.translation_en: Have you tried the rich and sweet haggis soup?
items.description: The term '猪汤' refers specifically to a local style of haggis/organ soup, and the pronunciation follows the regional phonetic pattern.

items.title: 曹操“喊话”来不来长治？回答我！
items.transcript: 你就说，长治们怎么耍的？
items.translation_en: Tell me, how do people have fun in Changzhi?
items.description: The use of '耍' (shuǎ) for traveling or having fun combined with the '们' particle is typical of the regional speech structure.

items.title: 曹操“喊话”来不来长治？回答我！
items.transcript: 长治，是们的地方耍。
items.translation_en: Changzhi is our place to have fun.
items.description: The sentence construction using '是们的' as a possessive and ending with '耍' is highly dialect-specific to the Changzhi area.

items.title: 曹操“喊话”来不来长治？回答我！
items.transcript: 长治哪一个地方抖落出来，不都是出片？
items.translation_en: Whichever part of Changzhi you show off, isn't it picture-perfect?
items.description: The phrase '抖落出来' (dǒu luò chū lái), meaning to reveal or show off, is a common colloquialism in Northern Chinese dialects, including Shanxi's.

items.title: 【Vinida万妮达｜动态】福州话挑战，让我教你几句家乡话
items.transcript: 假的叫假嘞
items.translation_en: 'Fake' is called 'Galle'.
items.description: Demonstrates the Fuzhou pronunciation for the word 'fake'.

items.title: 【Vinida万妮达｜动态】福州话挑战，让我教你几句家乡话
items.transcript: 蟑螂叫嘎拉
items.translation_en: 'Cockroach' is called 'Gala'.
items.description: Uses a specific Fuzhou dialect noun for cockroach.

items.title: 【Vinida万妮达｜动态】福州话挑战，让我教你几句家乡话
items.transcript: 架子叫嘎嘎
items.translation_en: 'Shelf' is called 'Gaga'.
items.description: Fuzhou-specific vocabulary for household items.

items.title: 【Vinida万妮达｜动态】福州话挑战，让我教你几句家乡话
items.transcript: 家里的叔叔叫嘎嘎
items.translation_en: Your uncle is called 'Gaga'.
items.description: Highlights a kinship term unique to the Fuzhou dialect.

items.title: 【Vinida万妮达｜动态】福州话挑战，让我教你几句家乡话
items.transcript: 嘎嘞嘎拉嘎嘎嘎嘞嘎嘎嘎
items.translation_en: A fake cockroach on a shelf bit the uncle.
items.description: A complete sentence/tongue twister showcasing the specific tonal and phonetic character of the Fuzhou dialect.

items.title: 我爱饭米粒 安徽合肥方言版 19 免提电话与名人难当
items.transcript: 要命了要命了，今个肯定迟到了，妈妈来，他在怎么不喊我一声来？
items.translation_en: It's awful, it's awful, I'm definitely late today. My goodness, why didn't he give me a shout?
items.description: Uses local modal particles like '来' (lai) at the end of sentences and the Hefei-specific pronunciation of '今个' (today).

items.title: 我爱饭米粒 安徽合肥方言版 19 免提电话与名人难当
items.transcript: 哎，别捞啦，这挺我的，挺我这种我的，他平时求我的还说？
items.translation_en: Hey, stop talking nonsense, this is mine, this supports me. Does he usually beg me for things anyway?
items.description: The verb '捞' (lāo) is a classic Hefei dialect term meaning to talk nonsense or nag incessantly.

items.title: 我爱饭米粒 安徽合肥方言版 19 免提电话与名人难当
items.transcript: 你看你这小孩，真是大惊小怪的，你看你看。
items.translation_en: Look at you, kid, you're making a fuss over nothing, look look.
items.description: Distinctive Hefei intonation where sentence endings often rise or fall sharply compared to Standard Mandarin.

items.title: 我爱饭米粒 安徽合肥方言版 19 免提电话与名人难当
items.transcript: 他不是怕家里的老婆吗？人家，人家把他老婆叫个什么？
items.translation_en: Isn't he afraid of his wife at home? They, they call his wife what?
items.description: The pronunciation of '老婆' (lǎo pó) exhibits the typical Hefei shift where the second syllable is shortened and the tone changes in a way characteristic of Jianghuai Mandarin.

items.title: 我爱饭米粒 安徽合肥方言版 19 免提电话与名人难当
items.transcript: 要不然，我们也凑点钱，再贷款，也是搞到这一块。
items.translation_en: Otherwise, we should also pool some money, get a loan, and do it together.
items.description: The phrase '搞到这一块' (gǎo dào zhè yī kuài) is a colloquial regional way of saying 'do it together' or 'get involved in this'.

items.title: 这句南阳话谁懂请留言
items.transcript: 今天来到南阳，我给大家说句老派南阳话，看大家能听懂不能，如果能知道啥意思，在下面留言。
items.translation_en: Today in Nanyang, I'll say an old-style Nanyang phrase for you to see if you can understand it. If you know what it means, please comment below.
items.description: Explicitly mentions 'Nanyang dialect' (南阳话) and uses the local questioning structure '...不能'.

items.title: 这句南阳话谁懂请留言
items.transcript: 哎，我的蚂蚱爷呀。蚂蚱爷，啥意思？
items.translation_en: Oh, my Mazha Ye! Mazha Ye, what does it mean?
items.description: '蚂蚱爷' (Mazha Ye) is a characteristic exclamation in the Nanyang dialect of Henan province.

items.title: 北京官话各方言综合对比（一）【东城 昌平 怀柔 延庆 武清 廊坊 承德 滦平 朝阳 赤峰等24点】
items.transcript: 你平时抽烟波？我不抽。
items.translation_en: Do you usually smoke? I don't.
items.description: Uses the question particle '怱' (bo) instead of '吗' (ma), which is a distinct characteristic of the Wuqing/Langfang regional influence on Northern Mandarin.

items.title: 北京官话各方言综合对比（一）【东城 昌平 怀柔 延庆 武清 廊坊 承德 滦平 朝阳 赤峰等24点】
items.transcript: 䄠連唱啥样ᄕ我没唱啊ᄕ放录音呀。
items.translation_en: What are you singing? I'm not singing, I'm playing a recording.
items.description: The use of '啥样' (sha yang) and the specific tonal inflections on the sentence endings are typical of the local Hebei-Beijing transition dialects.

items.title: 北京官话各方言综合对比（一）【东城 昌平 怀柔 延庆 武清 廊坊 承德 滦平 朝阳 赤峰等24点】
items.transcript: 䄠在唱啥呢ᄕ我没在唱ᄕ我放着录音呢。
items.translation_en: What are you singing? I'm not singing, I'm playing a recording.
items.description: The lexical choice of '啥' (sh) as a substitute for '什么' (sh�nme) is a prominent marker of Northern colloquial Mandarin.

items.title: 北京官话各方言综合对比（一）【东城 昌平 怀柔 延庆 武清 廊坊 承德 滦平 朝阳 赤峰等24点】
items.transcript: 我洗了愝了ᄕ今儿个就不出去打焮球了。
items.translation_en: I've showered, so I'm not going out to play basketball today.
items.description: The use of the rhoticized '今儿个' (jĠn'r g ) for 'today' is a strong indicator of the Beijing-Hebei dialect group.

items.title: 北京官话各方言综合对比（一）【东城 昌平 怀柔 延庆 武清 廊坊 承德 滦平 朝阳 赤峰等24点】
items.transcript: 上回就买了一本书。
items.translation_en: I only bought one book last time.
items.description: Uses '上回' (sh�nghu) instead of the standard '上次' (sh�ngc), which is a common dialectal preference in the region.

items.title: 闽南方言“突然”怎么讲的比较多，我讲“雄雄”！你讲啥？#闽南语实验室 #解锁闽南方言 #闽南乡音传播计划 #闽南的青年 #有影无 厦漳泉台·十里不同音
items.transcript: 无啁调
items.translation_en: Unexpectedly/Suddenly
items.description: Uses 'bô-tiâu-tî', a specific Southern Min colloquialism for something happening without warning.

items.title: 闽南方言“突然”怎么讲的比较多，我讲“雄雄”！你讲啥？#闽南语实验室 #解锁闽南方言 #闽南乡音传播计划 #闽南的青年 #有影无 厦漳泉台·十里不同音
items.transcript: 雄雄啦
items.translation_en: Suddenly/Abruptly
items.description: Uses 'hiông-hiông', a very common Minnan adverbial meaning 'suddenly' or 'violently fast'.

items.title: 闽南方言“突然”怎么讲的比较多，我讲“雄雄”！你讲啥？#闽南语实验室 #解锁闽南方言 #闽南乡音传播计划 #闽南的青年 #有影无 厦漳泉台·十里不同音
items.transcript: 你安当时
items.translation_en: When did you...
items.description: Uses 'an-tang-sî', the standard Minnan expression for 'when' or 'at what time'.

items.title: 闽南方言“突然”怎么讲的比较多，我讲“雄雄”！你讲啥？#闽南语实验室 #解锁闽南方言 #闽南乡音传播计划 #闽南的青年 #有影无 厦漳泉台·十里不同音
items.transcript: 风窗啦
items.translation_en: Suddenly
items.description: This is a regional phonetic variation or slang used in specific Minnan sub-dialects to mean 'suddenly'.

items.title: 你造吗？在牡丹江藏猫猫，这都是满语！你想到了么？去过牡丹江么？牡丹江有牡丹花吗？#东北话 #满语 #方言 ，快乐满语二百句，清史上手说满语，点击视频下方链接
items.transcript: 老太太逗孩子都是这样，猫一个，猫一个... 所以叫躲猫猫。
items.translation_en: Old ladies tease children like this, saying 'Mao' (hide)... That's why it's called hide and seek (Duo Mao Mao).
items.description: Explains the Manchu origin ('Mao' = Uncle) of a common local phrase used when playing with kids in the Northeast.

items.title: 你造吗？在牡丹江藏猫猫，这都是满语！你想到了么？去过牡丹江么？牡丹江有牡丹花吗？#东北话 #满语 #方言 ，快乐满语二百句，清史上手说满语，点击视频下方链接
items.transcript: 牡丹是满语弯曲的意思... 牡丹江就是弯曲的江。
items.translation_en: Mudan is the Manchu word for 'winding'... Mudanjiang means a winding river.
items.description: Clarifies the etymology of the city name 'Mudanjiang' as a Manchu loanword rather than Mandarin Chinese 'Peony.'

items.title: 【赣语说天下】第十九期 教师节诵诗《新竹》
items.transcript: 新竹高于旧竹枝，全凭老干为扶持。明年再有新生者，十丈龙孙绕凤池。
items.translation_en: New bamboo is taller than old branches, relying entirely on old stalks for support. Next year when new ones sprout, ten-foot dragon-grandsons will surround the Phoenix Pond.
items.description: Uses Gan Chinese phonology with specific tonal contours and initials/finals distinct from Standard Mandarin.

items.title: 【赣语说天下】第十九期 教师节诵诗《新竹》
items.transcript: 新竹高于旧竹枝，全凭老干为扶持。明年再有新生者，十丈龙孙绕凤池。
items.translation_en: New bamboo is taller than old branches, relying entirely on old stalks for support. Next year when new ones sprout, ten-foot dragon-grandsons will surround the Phoenix Pond.
items.description: A different regional variation of Gan Chinese with distinct vowel shifts and syllable endings.

items.title: 【赣语说天下】第十九期 教师节诵诗《新竹》
items.transcript: 新竹高于旧竹枝，全凭老干为扶持。明年再有新生者，十丈龙孙绕凤池。
items.translation_en: New bamboo is taller than old branches, relying entirely on old stalks for support. Next year when new ones sprout, ten-foot dragon-grandsons will surround the Phoenix Pond.
items.description: Features a different set of tones and glottal stops characteristic of a specific Gan sub-dialect.

items.title: 【赣语说天下】第十九期 教师节诵诗《新竹》
items.transcript: 新竹高于旧竹枝，全凭老干为扶持。明年再有新生者，十丈龙孙绕凤池。
items.translation_en: New bamboo is taller than old branches, relying entirely on old stalks for support. Next year when new ones sprout, ten-foot dragon-grandsons will surround the Phoenix Pond.
items.description: Recitation in another Gan dialect variety with unique pronunciation of the poem's characters.

items.title: 【赣语说天下】第十九期 教师节诵诗《新竹》
items.transcript: 新竹高于旧竹枝，全凭老干为扶持。明年再有新生者，十丈龙孙绕凤池。
items.translation_en: New bamboo is taller than old branches, relying entirely on old stalks for support. Next year when new ones sprout, ten-foot dragon-grandsons will surround the Phoenix Pond.
items.description: Final variation shown, highlighting the linguistic diversity within the Gan dialect group.

items.title: 一个人恶习难改 镇江人这样形容
items.transcript: 胜成皮长成锅
items.translation_en: The skin has grown into a pot (habits have become part of one's nature).
items.description: This is a specific idiom unique to the Zhenjiang dialect.

items.title: 一个人恶习难改 镇江人这样形容
items.transcript: 不囊啊你个水急涂的，你这个坏毛病喔，真真是胜成皮长成锅了。艾改都改不脱。
items.translation_en: Why are you spitting everywhere? This bad habit of yours has really become ingrained. It's impossible to change.
items.description: Uses local slang such as '不囊' and '水急涂', along with the dialectal pronunciation of the idiom.

items.title: 一个人恶习难改 镇江人这样形容
items.transcript: 你比如喔，好酒，一喝酒醉；好赌，赌得倾家荡产。
items.translation_en: For example, liking alcohol and getting drunk every time; or liking gambling and losing everything.
items.description: The speaker uses distinctive Zhenjiang intonation and pronunciation while providing examples.

items.title: 在广西南宁用皖南方言唱泼墨漓江（在酒店，没能放开嘿嘿嘿）
items.transcript: 迷离江色醉过千万年，夕照暮色衬不平淡然
items.translation_en: The blurred river colors have been drunk for thousands of years; the sunset and twilight cannot match its calm.
items.description: The singer uses tonal contours and vowel realizations specific to Southern Anhui dialects, notably different from Standard Mandarin.

items.title: 在广西南宁用皖南方言唱泼墨漓江（在酒店，没能放开嘿嘿嘿）
items.transcript: 那一庭赶山搜云是为了谁，天魂与谁姻差又挂...
items.translation_en: Whom is that garden of chasing mountains and searching clouds for? With whom is the heavenly soul mistakenly linked...
items.description: Clear dialectal pronunciation of '山' (mountain) and '云' (cloud) involving regional initial or final shifts.

items.title: 在广西南宁用皖南方言唱泼墨漓江（在酒店，没能放开嘿嘿嘿）
items.transcript: 翠色染遍东水洒小渡口，马蹄长磨入画梦...
items.translation_en: Emerald green dyes the eastern water sprinkling the small ferry; horse hooves wear down into the painted dream...
items.description: The nasal endings in words like '染' and '遍' demonstrate Wannan linguistic characteristics.

items.title: 在广西南宁用皖南方言唱泼墨漓江（在酒店，没能放开嘿嘿嘿）
items.transcript: 处处苦雨洒向阿姆的归期，听得晓梦落星洒大地
items.translation_en: Everywhere bitter rain sprinkles toward mother's return; hearing the morning dream fall like stars on the earth.
items.description: The pronunciation of '阿姆' (mother) and '大地' (earth) uses regional tones and phonemes.

items.title: 在广西南宁用皖南方言唱泼墨漓江（在酒店，没能放开嘿嘿嘿）
items.transcript: 湘柳岸旧雁翻湖扇望西窗，万叠层层怕看心...
items.translation_en: On the willow bank of the Xiang River, old geese flip by the lake; looking out the west window, thousands of layers of fear...
items.description: The word '层层' and the emotional delivery use distinct Southern Anhui phonetic markers.

items.title: ⚡ 朱 古 力 味 的 腌 面 ⚡(梅州版)
items.transcript: 叮当猫，唔使惜，想走就走。
items.translation_en: Doraemon, no need to care, leave if you want to leave.
items.description: Uses the Hakka phrase '唔使惜' (no need to care/treasure) and distinct tonal patterns.

items.title: ⚡ 朱 古 力 味 的 腌 面 ⚡(梅州版)
items.transcript: 昂可能喂？记得黄糖包就避分阿狗。
items.translation_en: How is it possible? Remember to give the brown sugar bun to Agou.
items.description: '昂可能' (how possible) is a signature interrogative phrase in Meizhou Hakka.

items.title: ⚡ 朱 古 力 味 的 腌 面 ⚡(梅州版)
items.transcript: 好喂，把黄糖包个钱单分我。
items.translation_en: Okay, give me the bill for the brown sugar bun.
items.description: Uses '分' as a verb for 'give', which is common in southern Chinese dialects including Hakka.

items.title: ⚡ 朱 古 力 味 的 腌 面 ⚡(梅州版)
items.transcript: 我有一只，我讲话你肯定多听。
items.translation_en: I have one; you will definitely listen to what I say.
items.description: The use of '一只' (one piece) for an abstract item or certain objects is typical in Hakka grammar.

items.title: ⚡ 朱 古 力 味 的 腌 面 ⚡(梅州版)
items.transcript: 小夫，昂喂似，快了点啊。
items.translation_en: Suneo, why is it like this, hurry up.
items.description: '昂喂似' is a dialectal way of saying 'why/how is it like this' in Hakka.

items.title: 说唐山话的小师妹
items.transcript: 哎不是二兄，你咋冲他们竖中指啊？
items.translation_en: Wait, Second Brother, why are you giving them the middle finger?
items.description: The use of '咋' (zǎ) instead of '怎么' (zěnme) and the distinctive rising and falling intonation pattern are classic features of the Tangshan dialect.

items.title: 说唐山话的小师妹
items.transcript: 那儿劲？欻他们！
items.translation_en: Where's the energy? Strike them!
items.description: The word '欻' (chuā) is a highly expressive local term often used in North-Eastern and Hebei (Tangshan) dialects to describe a swift, aggressive motion.

items.title: 说唐山话的小师妹
items.transcript: 哎呀我去，烫死我了。
items.translation_en: Oh my god, it's scalding me.
items.description: The exclamation '我去' (wǒ qù) combined with the specific flattening of tones in '烫死我了' showcases the regional phonetic style.

items.title: 说唐山话的小师妹
items.transcript: 我又闯祸了...
items.translation_en: I've caused trouble again...
items.description: The elongated vowel and the specific downward inflection on the final particle are characteristic of the Tangshan drawl.

items.title: 系列视频一：《青春》秦皇岛话
items.transcript: 人生有一首诗，当我们拥有它的时候，往往并没有读懂它
items.translation_en: Life has a poem; when we possess it, we often don't understand it.
items.description: The speaker's intonation on '人生' and '读懂' exhibits the characteristic flat tones and local phonetic variations typical of the Qinhuangdao dialect.

items.title: 系列视频一：《青春》秦皇岛话
items.transcript: 青春是那么美好，在这段复制不了的旅途中，我们拥有独一无二的记忆
items.translation_en: Youth is so beautiful; in this journey that cannot be duplicated, we have unique memories.
items.description: The phrasing and tonal emphasis on '美好' and '独一无二' reflect the regional linguistic patterns of Hebei's coastal dialects.

items.title: 系列视频一：《青春》秦皇岛话
items.transcript: 是的，青春是用来奋斗的，不是用来挥霍的
items.translation_en: Yes, youth is meant for striving, not for squandering.
items.description: The specific pronunciation of '奋斗' (striving) and the rising-falling cadence at the end of the sentence are indicative of the Qinhuangdao accent.

items.title: 系列视频一：《青春》秦皇岛话
items.transcript: 和那个站在最绚烂的骄阳下曾经青春的自己告别的时候
items.translation_en: When saying goodbye to that youthful self who once stood under the most brilliant sun
items.description: The rhythmic delivery and the tonal quality of '绚烂' and '骄阳' show a distinct departure from standard Putonghua into local dialect phonology.

items.title: 河北省各方言综合对比（三）【石家庄 保定 廊坊 衡水 沧州 张家口 承德 唐山 秦皇岛 邢台 邯郸等58点】
items.transcript: 我洗过澡了，今不打篮球了。
items.translation_en: I've taken a shower, I'm not playing basketball today.
items.description: The speaker uses a distinctive Qinhuangdao-style cadence, particularly in the flattened tones of the final syllables.

items.title: 河北省各方言综合对比（三）【石家庄 保定 廊坊 衡水 沧州 张家口 承德 唐山 秦皇岛 邢台 邯郸等58点】
items.transcript: 这是谁写的诗，谁猜出来了我就奖励谁十块钱。
items.translation_en: Who wrote this poem? Whoever guesses it, I'll reward them with ten yuan.
items.description: Notable tonal shifts on '诗' (poem) and '奖励' (reward) that are characteristic of the Ji-Lu Mandarin sub-dialects found in the region.

items.title: 河北省各方言综合对比（三）【石家庄 保定 廊坊 衡水 沧州 张家口 承德 唐山 秦皇岛 邢台 邯郸等58点】
items.transcript: 这是谁写的诗，谁才出来了我就给他在十块钱。
items.translation_en: Who wrote this poem? Whoever guesses it, I'll give them ten yuan.
items.description: This segment displays a very thick local accent with significant pitch changes on the verbs, reflecting the influence of Northeastern Mandarin on Qinhuangdao's speech.

items.title: 骑行陕西省咸阳市，吃凉菜，聊天，方言
items.transcript: 如果你到户县的话，那这绝对是香活。
items.translation_en: If you go to Huxian, it is definitely a treat.
items.description: The term '香活' (Xiāng huó) is a characteristic Shaanxi dialect word meaning comfortable, enjoyable, or very good.

items.title: 骑行陕西省咸阳市，吃凉菜，聊天，方言
items.transcript: 你长个多大了？
items.translation_en: How old have you grown to be? (How old are you?)
items.description: The phrasing '长个多大' to ask for someone's age is a colloquial regionalism found in the Guanzhong area.

items.title: 骑行陕西省咸阳市，吃凉菜，聊天，方言
items.transcript: 俺这块一样不，这一块这一块。
items.translation_en: Is it the same in our place? This part, this part.
items.description: The use of '俺' (ǎn) for 'my/our' and '这块' (zhè kuài) to mean 'this area/place' are common dialectal markers in Northern China.

items.title: 骑行陕西省咸阳市，吃凉菜，聊天，方言
items.transcript: 古桥，在那住哈怂，把人人捏五项都杀了。
items.translation_en: The old bridge, those bad guys stayed there and killed everyone.
items.description: The word '哈怂' (Hā sòng/sǒng) is a quintessential Shaanxi dialect term for a bad person or a scoundrel.

items.title: 骑行陕西省咸阳市，吃凉菜，聊天，方言
items.transcript: 那路上那骑得咚咚咚咚，都对人。
items.translation_en: Riding on that road it goes 'thump thump', it's bad for people.
items.description: The sentence structure and the specific use of '对人' to describe the effect of a bumpy road are typical of local informal speech.

items.title: 辽宁省各方言综合对比（二）【沈阳、大连、鞍山、抚顺、本溪、丹东、锦州、营口、阜新、辽阳、盘锦、铁岭、朝阳、葫芦岛】
items.transcript: 小张昨儿个钓一条大鱼吗，我没钓着鱼。
items.translation_en: Little Zhang caught a big fish yesterday, didn't he? I didn't catch any fish.
items.description: Uses the dialectal term '昨儿个' (yesterday) and the resultative construction '没钓着' (didn't catch), delivered in a distinctive Yingkou accent.

items.title: 辽宁省各方言综合对比（二）【沈阳、大连、鞍山、抚顺、本溪、丹东、锦州、营口、阜新、辽阳、盘锦、铁岭、朝阳、葫芦岛】
items.transcript: 这毛巾太埋汰了呀，你扔了吧。
items.translation_en: This towel is too dirty; you should throw it away.
items.description: Includes the word '埋汰' (māitai), which is a quintessential Northeastern dialect term for 'dirty'.

items.title: 上海阿姨自驾游之第四站：从天津自驾到了呼和浩特！#上海话 #上海方言  #自驾游呼和浩特#内蒙古#内蒙古自驾游#服务区厕所#厕所#探厕博主
items.transcript: 大家好，我是上海阿姨543
items.translation_en: Hello everyone, I am the Shanghai Auntie 543.
items.description: The speaker uses the Shanghainese pronunciation for 'I' (ngoo) and 'Shanghai' (za-he).

items.title: 上海阿姨自驾游之第四站：从天津自驾到了呼和浩特！#上海话 #上海方言  #自驾游呼和浩特#内蒙古#内蒙古自驾游#服务区厕所#厕所#探厕博主
items.transcript: 我切杯子一杯咖啡
items.translation_en: I'll drink a cup of coffee.
items.description: Uses 'chi' (eat) instead of 'he' (drink) for coffee, which is a characteristic verb usage in Shanghainese.

items.title: 上海阿姨自驾游之第四站：从天津自驾到了呼和浩特！#上海话 #上海方言  #自驾游呼和浩特#内蒙古#内蒙古自驾游#服务区厕所#厕所#探厕博主
items.transcript: 到内蒙古路拉上，我这一辈子也...
items.translation_en: On the road to Inner Mongolia, I have also...
items.description: Typical Shanghainese tone sandhi and vowel shifts in the pronunciation of 'Inner Mongolia'.

items.title: 上海阿姨自驾游之第四站：从天津自驾到了呼和浩特！#上海话 #上海方言  #自驾游呼和浩特#内蒙古#内蒙古自驾游#服务区厕所#厕所#探厕博主
items.transcript: 看看眼睛，吃吃牙风，看到...
items.translation_en: Looking around, having a snack, seeing...
items.description: The use of repetitive 'verb-verb' structure for casual actions and local pronunciation of 'eye' and 'teeth'.
